source_doc:
painting with bazkie! 🧵 a (slow) thread [1/x]
I figured it'd be fun to share the whole process that goes into making a painting a custom scene. could be useful to some, and entertaining to others :)
👩‍🦱 ~ EVE & ADAM ~ 🧔‍♂️
as you all know, I'm a deeply religious person 🛐 so..
the scene: we're in the garden of eden. adam is eating apples from the forbidden tree, because of course he is. eve is having none of his shit, grabs an unfortunate unsuspecting nearby serpent, and is about to whip the shit out of adam. 🐍
#painting

painting with bazkie! 🧵 a (slow) thread [2/x]
so, we're gonna need reference photos. I want eve to be in the process of swinging the serpent around; so then I figured a baseball batter would be a good fit.
so wading through the AI slop, I found this actual photo that has a nice pose and good lighting.

painting with bazkie! 🧵 a (slow) thread [3/x]
I want adam to be in a protective stance, while also holding a forbidden apple, and all this, seen from the side/back. also, the lighting has to come from the same side as the batter. so all and all, it's pretty hard to find a proper reference pic for this, so I am posing for this one myself.
took about 20 pics with slightly different in stances etc., and decided on this one. (the right hand is going to hold the apple)

和 bazkie 一起画画！🧵（慢更）连载贴 [1/x]
我觉得分享一幅定制场景画作的完整创作过程应该挺好玩的。可能对某些人有用，对其他人来说也能解个闷 :)
👩‍🦱 ~ 夏娃与亚当 ~ 🧔‍♂️
大家都知道，我是一个虔诚的信徒 🛐 所以……
场景是这样的：我们在伊甸园里。亚当正在偷吃禁果，因为他肯定忍不住。夏娃可不惯着他这臭脾气，一把抓起旁边一只倒霉且毫无防备的蛇，正准备用它把亚当狠狠抽一顿。🐍
#绘画

和 bazkie 一起画画！🧵（慢更）连载贴 [2/x]
所以，我们需要参考照片。我想让夏娃处于挥舞毒蛇的过程中；所以我琢磨着棒球击球手的姿势应该挺合适。

source_doc:
@ptoothfish why do all of the kids’ IMDb headshots look like they’re screen grabs from This Person Does Not Exist dot com? 😬

@bloodflowersburning yup the whole production machine is giving uncanny valley
even if they are real kids underneath, i wonder how much tuning up their images get 😬
smiles widened, dimples accentuated, etc
i stand by my assertion they will be treated like hot-swappable parts if they do anything complicated like have an opinion or grow into their faces wrong

@ptoothfish oh they absolutely will. There’s probably even some contract clauses that lands them in deep weta if they even sneeze wrong.
instruction: You are a professional Chinese, Simplified translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Chinese, Simplified (zho_Hans). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Chinese, Simplified grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is user-generated content from a social media platform. Do not reproduce spelling mistakes. Reproduce marks of expressiveness that communicate meaningful intent (e.g. enthusiasm through capitalisation or elongation) in a way that is natural in Chinese, Simplified. Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. Produce only the Chinese, Simplified translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Chinese, Simplified (zho_Hans):
hypo_0:
@ptoothfish 为什么这些童星在 IMDb 上的头像看起来都那么像用 This Person Does Not Exist 那个网站生成的虚拟人脸啊？😬

@bloodflowersburning 没错，整套制作机制都透着一股恐怖谷效应
就算他们本身是真人，我也怀疑这些照片被过度修图了 😬
比如嘴角拉宽、酒窝加深之类的
我还是坚持我的看法：要是他们敢整出点什么幺蛾子，比如发表个人意见或者长残了，分分钟就会像个配件一样被换掉

@ptoothfish 噢，绝对会这样。甚至可能有一些合同条款规定，他们要是行差踏错一步，就会惹上大麻烦。
hypo_1:
@ptoothfish 为什么那些童星在 IMDb 上的头像看起来那么像从 This Person Does Not Exist 网站上截的图啊？😬

@bloodflowersburning 就是说啊，整套制作流程都让人觉得有种恐怖谷效应
就算底子是真人，我也怀疑这些照片不知道被修成什么样了 😬

source_doc:
Jade, if you want to get back together with Beck, then why don't you just tell him?
I did, but he rejected me.
Um, not to be mean, but why are you coming to me for help?
Because I don't want anyone who's cool to see me like this.
Okay, maybe you should wait.
Are we.
We're not even friends.
Well, yeah, but if you help me.
Maybe I'll like you.
So if I help you, I get a mean friend and a broken kite.
Please, just please talk to Beck for me.

source_doc:
Anytime I walk up this hill, I'm like dying.
I'm always out of breath.
Also, I forgot to mention, but I want this vlog to be a day in the life of a self-employed person.
I got this new little pocket camera and I'm so excited about it.
So.
I'm just gonna take some content with this.
Go all the way to the top, come to the edge with your shoes.
Perfect.
And then center your necklace for me and like, leave it unzipped.
And then, yeah, the stole will kind of cover the zippers.

The fried eggs have turned to scrambled eggs.
You know what?
Considering we didn't have a spatula, it's not horrible.
Yum.

Also, yes, I do put the the milk in first because this way the cereal doesn't get soggy.
Unfortunately, it seems my opinion is a rather unpopular one.

source_doc:
My brother in He-Who-Shall-Not-Be-Named, what you are describing is a consequence of _misogyny_, not "misandry."

I desperately need men to realize that just because it's directed at them and an actual serious problem doesn't mean it is "misandry."
Just saw someone describe being discriminated against _for being considered effeminate_ as "misandry" and I just.

It's not that you aren't experiencing something real. You very well may be. But it isn't "misandry." Because "misandry" doesn't exist.
Yes, this applies to trans men as well. "Transmisandry" _also_ isn't a thing and just contributes to anti-feminist narratives. It treats itself as a mirror of transmisogyny, but transmisogyny is _intersective_: we experience transphobia _and_ we experience misogyny _and_ we experience this unholy thing that happens when the two interact. It's not a subset, even an exclusive subset, it's an intersection.
But the following all are absolutely problems that can be talked about!
* Transphobia/Transmisia
* Antitransmasculity
* Transemasculation
* Misogyny
It sucks to be discriminated against, but the language that we use is so, so important here.

我真的急需男人们明白，一件事就算针对他们而且确实是个严重的问题，也并不意味着它就是“厌男”。
刚刚看到有人把因为“被认为娘娘腔”而受到歧视说成是“厌男”，我真的无语了。

这并不是说你经历的事情不真实。你很可能确实经历了。但那真的不是“厌男”。因为“厌男”这玩意儿压根不存在。
没错，这也同样适用于跨性别男性。“跨性别厌男”同样不存在，而且只会助长反女权的言论。它把自己标榜为“跨性别厌女”的镜像，但“跨性别厌女”是“交叉”发生的：我们既经历跨性别恐惧，又经历厌女症，还经历这两者结合时产生的极其恶劣的化学反应。它不是一个子集，甚至不是一个专属子集，而是一个交汇点。

source_doc:
Whoa, you mean Blender Market, the thing I said was the first step towards the Blender environment becoming a shitty subscription service, renamed itself to the oh-so-appealing name "Superhive" and then decided to mandate subscriptions?
WHOA WHO COULD HAVE GUESSED?! Not me, that's for sure. This is completely out of left field!

TBH, I have never seen a single company with "Hive" in the name that wasn't a complete shitshow run by assholes, so I never bought anything on that platform -
Sorry
I didn't RENT anything on that platform if I could help it.
Maybe it's unfair, but "clearly we, a company that specializes in connecting creators with their audience, should name ourselves HIVE, because the creators are just our loyal little bees, and audience is our loyal little bees, work for us!" always gives me bad vibes.

"Hive implies busy crowds!"
Hive implies a queen.

哇，谁能料到啊？！反正不是我，这可真是太让人“意外”了！

说实话，我还没见过哪家名字里带 “Hive” 的公司不是一团糟、而且还由一帮混蛋运营的。所以只要能不买，我绝对不在那平台上买任何东西——
对不起
应该是只要能不租，我绝对不在那平台上租任何东西。

source_doc:
I expected to love Project Hail Mary, I LOVED Project Hail Mary, it also destroyed me in a particularly unique way as the wife of a science teacher after a year of watching all science teaching be relentlessly attacked and defunded. People love this movie, which I'm sure will be a success, and they hate my wife's work and destroy her programs and want us to lose our careers. How is it possible for all this to be true at once.

She left at 7am to go teach the hands on labs that she teaches where they handle cells, where they've increased class sizes and reduced TAs, she spends more contact hours with students in lab basements than any other class on the campus. She created a program for community college transfer students to get funded jobs in labs, opening up STEM pathways for those who never would've gotten the chance. For all her above and beyond work she's demonized as "doing DEI in science" which they call illegal

But you know, I guess if she were a white male software engineer writing fanfic about science teaching.... she'd be safe.

@grimalkina the same roots are already in Hail Mary tbh. I like Andy Weir a lot and I don't think he meant it, but the whole "bureaucracy and cooperation are truly the barrier to getting things done, and when shit hits the fan we get a powerful anti-bureaucrat to forego diplomacy and strongarm everyone into doing the project, ethics or what the participants want be damned" struck me as a very American individualism power fantasy, and I would guess an American wrote it if I didn't know

@jcachada @grimalkina
For what it's worth, the book contains this passage that didn't make it to the movie.
---
“I’m curious,” I say to Stratt. “Once we launch Hail Mary. What will you do then?”
“Me?” she said. “Doesn’t matter. Once the Hail Mary launches, my authority ends. I’ll probably be put on trial by a bunch of pissed-off governments for abuse of power. Might spend the rest of my life in jail.”
“I’ll be in the cell next to you,” said Leclerc.
“Are you at all concerned about that?”
She shrugged. “We all have to make sacrifices. If I have to be the world’s whipping boy to secure our salvation, then that’s my sacrifice to make.”
---
Is she better or worse if she thinks she's sacrificing herself?

hypo_0:
我本以为自己会很喜欢《挽救计划》，结果我确实超级爱这部小说。但作为一名科学老师的妻子，在经历了一整年目睹所有科学教学遭到无情攻击和资金削减之后，这本书也以一种特别独特的方式彻底击碎了我。人们追捧这部我确信会大获成功的电影，却痛恨我妻子的工作，毁掉她的教学项目，甚至想让我们丢掉饭碗。这一切怎么可能同时发生啊。

她早上7点就出门去上她负责的实践实验课了，学生们在课上要处理细胞。学校扩大了班级规模，还减少了助教，她在实验室地下室里跟学生面对面交流的时间比校园里任何一门课都多。她还专门为社区大学的转学生创立了一个项目，让他们能在实验室里拿到有资助的工作，为那些原本绝无可能的人开辟了通往STEM领域的道路。然而，就因为这些超出本职的付出，她却被妖魔化为“在科学界搞多元、平等和包容（DEI）”，他们还说这是违法的。

不过你懂的，我想如果她是个白人男性软件工程师，写写关于科学教学的同人小说……她可能就安全了。

@grimalkina 说实话，《挽救计划》里其实早就根植了相同的套路。我很喜欢安迪·威尔，我觉得他不是故意的，但整本书都在宣扬“官僚主义和合作才是真正阻碍办事的绊脚石，一旦大难临头，我们就会迎来一个强大的反官僚主义英雄，他会放弃外交，强迫所有人去执行项目，管他什么伦理道德，管他参与者想不想要”，这给我的感觉就是非常典型美式个人主义的力量幻想。如果我事先不知道，我绝对会猜这是一个美国人写的。

@jcachada @grimalkina
不管怎么说，原著里有这么一段话，但没有拍进电影里。
---
“我很好奇，”我对斯特拉特说，“一旦我们发射了‘圣母号’（Hail Mary），你之后会做什么？”
“我？”她说，“无所谓。‘圣母号’一旦发射，我的权力也就到头了。我可能会因为滥用职权，被一群气急败坏的政府送上法庭审判。下半辈子可能都得在监狱里度过。”
“我会住在你隔壁牢房，”勒克莱尔说。
“你对此一点都不担心吗？”
她耸了耸肩。“我们都必须做出牺牲。如果我必须成为全世界的替罪羊才能拯救大家，那这就是我该做出的牺牲。”
---

hypo_1:
我本以为自己会很喜欢《挽救计划》，结果我确实爱死这部小说了。但作为一名科学老师的妻子，在经历了一整年目睹所有科学教育遭到无情攻击和资金削减之后，这本书也以一种特别独特的方式彻底击碎了我。人们疯狂追捧这部我确信会大获成功的电影，却痛恨我妻子的工作，毁掉她的教学项目，甚至想让我们丢掉饭碗。这一切怎么可能同时发生啊。

她早上7点就出门去上她负责的实践实验课了，学生们在课上要处理细胞。学校扩大了班级规模，还减少了助教，她在地下实验室里跟学生面对面交流的时间比校园里任何一门课都多。她还专门为社区大学的转学生创立了一个项目，让他们能在实验室里拿到有资助的工作，为那些原本绝无可能的人开辟了通往STEM领域的道路。然而，就因为这些超出本职的付出，她却被妖魔化为“在科学界搞DEI（多元、平等和包容）”，他们还说这是违法的。

不过你懂的，我想如果她是个白人男性软件工程师，写写关于科学教学的同人小说……她可能就安全了。

“我会住在你隔壁牢房，”勒克莱尔说。
“你对此一点都不担心吗？”
她耸了耸肩。“我们都必须做出牺牲。如果我必须成为全世界的替罪羊才能换来我们的救赎，那这就是我该做出的牺牲。”
---
如果她觉得自己是在自我牺牲，那是让她显得更崇高了，还是更糟糕了呢？
hypothesis:
我本以为自己会很喜欢《挽救计划》，结果我简直爱死《挽救计划》了。但作为一名科学老师的妻子，在经历了一整年目睹所有科学教学遭到无情攻击和资金削减之后，这本书也以一种特别独特的方式彻底击碎了我。人们疯狂追捧这部我确信会大获成功的电影，却痛恨我妻子的工作，毁掉她经手的项目，甚至想让我们丢掉饭碗。这一切怎么可能同时发生啊。

她早上7点就出门去上她负责的实践实验课了，学生们在课上要处理细胞。学校扩大了班级规模，还减少了助教，她在地下实验室里跟学生面对面交流的时间比学校里任何一门课都多。她还专门为社区大学的转学生创立了一个项目，让他们能在实验室里拿到有资助的工作，为那些原本绝无可能的人开辟了通往STEM领域的道路。然而，就因为这些超出本职的付出，她却被妖魔化为“在科学界搞DEI（多元、平等和包容）”，他们还说这是违法的。

不过你懂的，我想如果她是个白人男性软件工程师，写写关于科学教学的同人小说……她可能就安全了。

@grimalkina 说实话，《挽救计划》里其实早就根植了相同的套路。我很喜欢安迪·威尔，我觉得他不是故意的，但整本书都在宣扬“官僚主义和合作才是真正阻碍办事的绊脚石，一旦大难临头，我们就会迎来一个强大的反官僚主义英雄，他会放弃外交，强行逼迫所有人去执行项目，管他什么伦理道德，管他参与者想不想要”，这给我的感觉就是非常典型美式个人主义的力量幻想。如果我事先不知道，我绝对会猜这是一个美国人写的。

@jcachada @grimalkina
不管怎么说，原著里有这么一段话，但没有拍进电影里。
---
“我很好奇，”我对斯特拉特说，“一旦我们发射了‘圣母号’。你之后会做什么？”
“我？”她说，“无所谓。‘圣母号’一旦发射，我的权力也就到头了。我可能会因为滥用职权，被一群气急败坏的政府送上法庭审判。下半辈子可能都得在监狱里度过。”

她耸了耸肩。“我们都必须做出牺牲。如果我必须成为全世界的替罪羊才能换来我们的救赎，那这就是我该做出的牺牲。”
---
如果她觉得自己是在自我牺牲，那是让她显得更崇高了，还是更糟糕了呢？

Hello?
Hello?
Who's there?
My name is Emily.
Who are you?
I am Sam.
Who are these people?
I don't know.
They had masks on, so I didn't get to see.
Are there others?
Others?
Yeah.
Like.
Like us?
I don't know.

source_doc:
right, so, as i was saying, i dmed this very well known and very friendly seeming artist-type person and gave em the usual spiel:
- how bridge works
- how to bridge
- please do so because i want to follow you and reblog some of your stuff that i like
- if you don't want to, that's fine
and they responded "not doing that" which is all well and good but then they blocked me???
just like, for absolutely no fucking reason

not naming any names because i do NOT dislike anybody involved and i certainly do not want to incite any brigading, but this has happened with several people now, including people who have REBLOGGED AND LIKED BRIDGED POSTS FROM THIS ACCOUNT (my main), which is WHY I WANTED TO FOLLOW THEM

if they had just said "no thanks" they would have gotten an "ok, perfectly understandable! :)" or the like from me, but now everyone has to put up with my confused ranting instead. i'm not even angry, i'm just *genuinely baffled*

bsky people, is this a genuine issue over on your platform (because it's one i've almost *never* had over here on this side of the bridge) or am i just running into bad apple after bad apple

I honestly don't know what people's general feelings are about enabling the Bridgy Fed here, because that's just not a topic that ever comes up tbh (unfortunately)… But there's definitely some subset of people here who are super trigger-happy about the block button, I'm not a fan of this either.

hypo_0:
好吧，就像我刚才说的，我给这位非常有名、而且看起来超级友善的艺术家类型的人发了私信，跟他们说了那套词儿：
- 桥接是怎么运作的
- 怎么进行桥接
- 拜托试试吧，因为我想关注你，还想转发一些我喜欢的你的作品
- 如果你不想弄，那也没关系
然后他们回了一句“不弄这个”，这倒也没什么，但接着他们就把我拉黑了？？？
就莫名其妙，完全没有任何特么的理由

我不会指名道姓，因为我绝对没有针对任何人的意思，也绝对不想挑起任何网络围攻，但这种事已经发生在好几个人身上了，甚至包括那些转发过、点赞过我这个账号（我的主账号）桥接帖子的家伙！正因为这样我才想关注他们啊

如果他们只是说句“不用了谢谢”，那我肯定会回个“好哒，完全理解！:)”之类的，但现在大家就不得不忍受我在这儿困惑地碎碎念了。我甚至都没生气，我只是*真心觉得莫名其妙*

bsky的家人们，这在你们平台上是一个普遍存在的问题吗（因为在桥接的这一端我几乎*从来*没遇到过这种事），还是说我只是单纯地倒霉，接二连三地碰上奇葩

说实话，我真的不知道大家对在这里启用 Bridgy Fed 普遍是什么看法，因为说真的，这根本就不是一个会被提起的话题（唉，可惜了）……但这里绝对有一部分人超级喜欢拉黑别人，动不动就按拉黑键，我也不太喜欢这种风气。

说实话，我真的不知道大家对在这里启用 Bridgy Fed 普遍是什么看法，因为说真的，这根本就不是一个会被提起的话题（可惜了）……但这里绝对有一小撮人超级喜欢拉黑别人，动不动就按拉黑键，我也不太喜欢这种风气。
hypo_7:
好啦，就像我刚才说的，我私信了一位名气很大、而且看起来超级友善的艺术家，跟他们说了那套老生常谈的话：
- 桥接是怎么运作的
- 怎么搞桥接
- 拜托试试吧，因为我想关注你，还想转一些我喜欢的你的作品
- 如果你不想弄，那也没关系
结果他们回了一句“不搞这个”，这倒也无所谓，但接着他们就把我拉黑了？？？
就真的是，完全特么的莫名其妙

我不会指名道姓，因为我绝对没有针对任何人的意思，也绝对不想煽动大家去围攻，但这种事已经发生在好几个人身上了，甚至包括那些转发和点赞过我这个账号（我的大号）桥接帖子的家伙！正因为这样我才想关注他们的啊

source_doc:
This morning while walking to work I had a thought: is it possible that the reason why the perception of the #replyGuy problem being worse on #Mastodon (and the #Fediverse in general) is due to sheer (lack of) numbers?
So I came up with a simplified model to check if this was indeed sufficient to explain the phenomenon.
Let's assume that, similarly to Mario Cipolla's Basic Laws of Human Stupidity, the fraction of reply guys in a population is a given constant ρ.
1/n
#maths

Let's also assume for simplicity that reply guys operate mechanically, i.e. do not use some kind of automation to find posts to reply to. This puts an upper limit to the total number of posts a reply guy can reply to in the course of a single day. Let's call this D.
We can also assume that on average a single non-reply-guy will generally post P < D posts per day.
Ignoring for a moment larger timeframes than a single day (but the discussion is similar if we extend the observation period) …
2/n

 … and assuming replyguys select randomly the posts to reply to (i.e. they don't specifically target a person for any particular reason), can we calculate what is the probability that a given person will see at least one reply from a reply guy?
Before doing the actual math, let's look at some practical example. Let's say that 1 in 10 users are reply guys, a reply guy goes through 100 posts per day, and a regular user posts 10 messages per day.
3/n

If there are 10 users in the network, 9 are regular users and 1 is a reply guy. There are 90 regular posts per day, and the the single reply guy will see ALL of them (because they can read 100 posts per day, so they see all the posts made on that network on that day.
However, if there are 100 users in the network, 10 of which are reply guys, the network will produce 900 posts in a day, but reply guys will NOT necessarily see all of them!
4/n

In the second scenario, each reply guy will see 100 random posts of the 900. Even if there are 10 reply guys, this does NOT mean that each post will be found by a reply guy! There may be posts that are seen by multiple reply guys, and posts that will not be seen by any reply guy!
So how do we compute the probability for a post to be seen by a reply guy in this case?
One way to do this is to compute the probability of NOT being seen by ANY reply guy, and taking the complement.
5/n

Now, since each reply guy sees 100 of the 900 posts, each post has a 1/9 probability of being seen by any particular reply guy, i.e. an 8/9 probability of NOT being seen by that particular reply guy. The probability of not being seen by ANY reply guy is thus 8/9 for each reply guy and assuming that the probabilities are independent, this means that the probability of not being seen by any of the 10 reply guys is (8/9)^10, which is 0.30794....
6/n

This means that the probability for each post to be seen by AT LEAST ONE reply guy is 1-(8/9)^10 or approximately 69%.
Of course, if someone posts 10 posts per day, then the probability for them to come across a reply guy is higher than that, because it will be the probability of at least on their post being seen by at least one reply guy!
Again assuming that for each post the probabilities are independent, the math is only slightly more complex:
6/n

each post has a (8/9)^10 probability of not being seen, but for the probability for ALL posts not being seen, that has to be further elevated to the number of posts made by the same person, which is 10, so (8/9)^100, and the probability of AT LEAST ONE POST being seen by AT LEAST ONE reply guys becomes 1 - (8/9)^100 = 0.99999233… which is not 100% but very close to it.
This was the case of a network 100 people, 10 of which are reply guys. Let's do one more and then go general.
7/n

Let's now assume the network has 100K users, still with the same 10% of reply guys (90K regular users, 10K reply guys).
Each reply guy still reads 100 posts per day, and the regular users still produce 10 posts per day.
This means that in a single day the regular users produce 900K posts, and each reply guys reads 100 of those 900K posts!
Still under the randomness assumption, this means that a single reply guy will only see 100/900K posts!
8/n
instruction: You are a professional Chinese, Simplified translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Chinese, Simplified (zho_Hans). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Chinese, Simplified grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is user-generated content from a social media platform. Do not reproduce spelling mistakes. Reproduce marks of expressiveness that communicate meaningful intent (e.g. enthusiasm through capitalisation or elongation) in a way that is natural in Chinese, Simplified. Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. Produce only the Chinese, Simplified translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Chinese, Simplified (zho_Hans):
hypo_0:
今天早上在去上班的路上，我突然想到一个问题：大家都觉得 #回复男 (replyGuy) 的问题在 #Mastodon (以及整个 #Fediverse 联邦宇宙) 上更严重，这有没有可能纯粹是因为（缺乏）用户基数导致的？
所以我建了一个简化模型，想看看这是否真的足以解释这个现象。
我们先假设，类似于卡洛·奇波拉的《人类愚蠢基本定律》，一个群体中回复男的比例是一个给定的常数 ρ。
1/n
#数学

为了简单起见，我们还假设回复男都是手动操作的，也就是说，他们不使用任何自动化工具来寻找可回复的帖子。这样一来，一个回复男在一天内能回复的帖子总数就会有一个上限。我们把这个上限设为 D。
我们还可以假设，平均而言，一个非回复男的普通用户每天通常会发 P < D 篇帖子。
先不考虑比单天更长的时间跨度（如果延长观察期，讨论结果也差不多）……
2/n

……并假设回复男是随机选择帖子进行回复的（也就是说，他们并不是出于特定原因专门针对某个人），那我们能算出某个特定的人看到至少一条回复男回复的概率是多少吗？
在进行实际的数学计算之前，我们先来看一个实际的例子。假设每 10 个用户中就有 1 个是回复男，一个回复男每天浏览 100 篇帖子，而一个普通用户每天发 10 条消息。
3/n

如果网络中只有 10 个用户，其中 9 个是普通用户，1 个是回复男。那么每天会有 90 篇普通帖子，而这唯一一个回复男会看到所有的帖子（因为他每天可以看 100 篇帖子，所以他能看到那天该网络上发的所有帖子）。
然而，如果网络中有 100 个用户，其中 10 个是回复男，那么这个网络一天会产生 900 篇帖子，但回复男不一定能看到所有的帖子！
4/n

在第二种情况下，每个回复男会从 900 篇帖子中随机看到 100 篇。即使有 10 个回复男，这也不意味着每篇帖子都会被回复男发现！可能会有些帖子被多个回复男看到，而有些帖子则完全没有被任何回复男看到！
那么，在这种情况下，我们该如何计算一篇帖子被回复男看到的概率呢？
一种方法是计算不被任何回复男看到的概率，然后再取其对立事件（余事件）。
5/n

现在，因为每个回复男会看 900 篇帖子中的 100 篇，所以每篇帖子被某个特定回复男看到的概率是 1/9，也就是说，不被那个特定回复男看到的概率是 8/9。因此，不被任何回复男看到的概率对每个回复男来说都是 8/9。假设这些概率是相互独立的，这意味着不被这 10 个回复男中任何一个看到的概率就是 (8/9)^10，也就是 0.30794……
6/n

这意味着，每篇帖子被至少一个回复男看到的概率是 1-(8/9)^10，大约是 69%。
当然，如果有人每天发 10 篇帖子，那么他们遇到回复男的概率会比这更高，因为那将是他们至少有一篇帖子被至少一个回复男看到的概率！
同样假设每篇帖子的概率是相互独立的，计算只是稍微复杂了一点点：
6/n

每篇帖子有 (8/9)^10 的概率不被看到，但如果要计算所有帖子都不被看到的概率，那就得把这个概率再乘以同一个人所发的帖子数，也就是 10，所以是 (8/9)^100。这样，至少有一篇帖子被至少一个回复男看到的概率就变成了 1 - (8/9)^100 = 0.99999233……虽然不是 100%，但也非常接近了。
这是在一个有 100 人（其中 10 人是回复男）的网络中的情况。我们再来看一个例子，然后进行推广。
7/n

现在我们假设这个网络有 10 万用户，回复男的比例依然是 10%（即 9 万普通用户，1 万回复男）。
每个回复男每天依然阅读 100 篇帖子，普通用户每天依然产生 10 篇帖子。
这意味着在一天内，普通用户会产生 90 万篇帖子，而每个回复男会阅读这 90 万篇帖子中的 100 篇！
在同样符合随机性假设的前提下，这意味着一个回复男只会看到 100/90万 的帖子！
8/n
hypo_1:

在进行实际的数学计算之前，我们先来看一个实际的例子。假设每 10 个用户中就有 1 个是回复男，一个回复男每天浏览 100 篇帖子，而一个普通用户每天发 10 条消息。
3/n

如果网络中只有 10 个用户，其中 9 个是普通用户，1 个是回复男。那么每天会有 90 篇普通帖子，而这唯一一个回复男会看到所有的帖子（因为他每天可以看 100 篇帖子，所以他能看到那天该网络上发的所有帖子）。
然而，如果网络中有 100 个用户，其中 10 个是回复男，那么这个网络一天会产生 900 篇帖子，但回复男不一定能看到所有的帖子！
4/n

在第二种情况下，每个回复男会从 900 篇帖子中随机看到 100 篇。即使有 10 个回复男，这也不意味着每篇帖子都会被回复男发现！可能会有些帖子被多个回复男看到，而有些帖子则完全没有被任何回复男看到！
那么，在这种情况下，我们该如何计算一篇帖子被回复男看到的概率呢？
一种方法是计算不被任何回复男看到的概率，然后再取其对立事件。
5/n

现在，因为每个回复男会看 900 篇帖子中的 100 篇，所以每篇帖子被某个特定回复男看到的概率是 1/9，也就是说，不被那个特定回复男看到的概率是 8/9。因此，不被任何回复男看到的概率对每个回复男来说都是 8/9。假设这些概率是相互独立的，这意味着不被这 10 个回复男中任何一个看到的概率就是 (8/9)^10，也就是 0.30794……
6/n

这意味着，每篇帖子被至少一个回复男看到的概率是 1-(8/9)^10，大约是 69%。
当然，如果有人每天发 10 篇帖子，那么他们遇到回复男的概率会比这更高，因为那将是他们至少有一篇帖子被至少一个回复男看到的概率！
同样假设每篇帖子的概率是相互独立的，计算只是稍微复杂了一点点：
6/n

每篇帖子有 (8/9)^10 的概率不被看到，但如果要计算所有帖子都不被看到的概率，那就得把这个概率再乘以同一个人所发的帖子数，也就是 10 次方，所以是 (8/9)^100。这样，至少有一篇帖子被至少一个回复男看到的概率就变成了 1 - (8/9)^100 = 0.99999233……虽然不是 100%，但也无限接近了。
这是在一个有 100 人（其中 10 人是回复男）的网络中的情况。我们再来看一个例子，然后进行推广。
7/n

现在我们假设这个网络有 10 万用户，回复男的比例依然是 10%（即 9 万普通用户，1 万回复男）。
每个回复男每天依然阅读 100 篇帖子，普通用户每天依然产生 10 篇帖子。
这意味着在一天内，普通用户会产生 90 万篇帖子，而每个回复男会阅读这 90 万篇帖子中的 100 篇！
在同样符合随机性假设的前提下，这意味着一个回复男只会看到 100/90万 的帖子！
8/n

现在，因为每个回复男会看 900 篇帖子中的 100 篇，所以每篇帖子被某个特定回复男看到的概率是 1/9，也就是说，不被那个特定回复男看到的概率是 8/9。因此，不被任何回复男看到的概率对每个回复男来说都是 8/9。假设这些概率是相互独立的，这意味着不被这 10 个回复男中任何一个看到的概率就是 (8/9)^10，也就是 0.30794……
6/n

这意味着，每篇帖子被至少一个回复男看到的概率是 1-(8/9)^10，大约是 69%。
当然，如果有人每天发 10 篇帖子，那么他们遇到回复男的概率会比这更高，因为那将是他们至少有一篇帖子被至少一个回复男看到的概率！
同样假设每篇帖子的概率是相互独立的，计算只是稍微复杂了一点点：
6/n

每篇帖子有 (8/9)^10 的概率不被看到，但如果要计算所有帖子都不被看到的概率，那就得把这个概率再乘以同一个人所发的帖子数，也就是 10 次方，所以是 (8/9)^100。这样，至少有一篇帖子被至少一个回复男看到的概率就变成了 1 - (8/9)^100 = 0.99999233……虽然不是 100%，但也无限接近了。
这是在一个有 100 人（其中 10 人是回复男）的网络中的情况。我们再来看一个例子，然后进行推广。
7/n

现在我们假设这个网络有 10 万用户，回复男的比例依然是 10%（即 9 万普通用户，1 万回复男）。
每个回复男每天依然阅读 100 篇帖子，普通用户每天依然产生 10 篇帖子。
这意味着在一天内，普通用户会产生 90 万篇帖子，而每个回复男会阅读这 90 万篇帖子中的 100 篇！
在同样符合随机性假设的前提下，这意味着一个回复男只会看到 100/90万 的帖子！
8/n

挺好看的，是吧？

source_doc:
Well.
Hello, Edinburgh.
How dare I welcome you to the Edinburgh International Book Festival, the foremost literature festival, certainly in the United Kingdom, if not in the world.
Do we agree?
It's my favourite anyway.
And that's what.
That's what counts.
Because I'm the chair.
A little bit of power corrupts, does it not?

source_doc:
project move out, spring break relay
day 1:
Cleared main bedroom closet
& contents of boxes on one wall.
I'm surveying all my belongings. Pulling out a small percentage to save. Sentimental items. Practical pieces for putting together a new life. At this stage I know I'm selecting more than I need, probably more than I can carry; but the amount that I'm leaving behind is far greater. Deciding what to keep & where comes after the survey. All the rest will be turned over to "scavengers."
#moverR

Day 2, midday break, Monday.
Today is harder than yesterday. I'm uncovering far more "sentimental" stuff. The challenge: these saved memories are a physical drag that impair rather than contribute anything practically to my future AND I feel integrated looking at them. There's a strong general condemnation, I feel, of holding onto sentimental items. Yet I know that they are powerful. But hey, I'm an artist. Even wistful, sad memories are valuable to me. I'm proceeding as before, retaining less+

+than I'm tossing, while knowing that I am keeping "too much." The next phase will be the actual moving & storing phase when more might be cut. This phase is the pre-screen before turning the cleared items over to others who will take everything away.
File under: how to move out of a home of 12 years & a home town of 45 years, with family roots here (& artifacts) from 150 years. I'm finally leaving, in search of a culture that suits my values.
#moverR
instruction: You are a professional Chinese, Simplified translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Chinese, Simplified (zho_Hans). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Chinese, Simplified grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is user-generated content from a social media platform. Do not reproduce spelling mistakes. Reproduce marks of expressiveness that communicate meaningful intent (e.g. enthusiasm through capitalisation or elongation) in a way that is natural in Chinese, Simplified. Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. Produce only the Chinese, Simplified translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Chinese, Simplified (zho_Hans):
hypo_0:
搬家项目启动，春假接力
第 1 天：
清理了主卧衣柜
和一面墙上纸箱里的东西。
我正在盘点我的所有物品。挑出一小部分保留。有纪念意义的物品，还有重建新生活用得着的实用小物件。我知道在这个阶段我挑出来的东西已经超出了我的需要，可能也超出了我的承载能力；但我留下的东西要多得多。盘点完之后再决定留下什么以及放在哪里。其余的所有东西都会留给“拾荒者”。
#搬家记

第 2 天，周一，午间休息。
今天比昨天更难熬。我翻出了更多“有纪念意义”的东西。纠结的地方在于：这些保留下来的回忆在物理上是个累赘，对我的未来没有任何实际帮助，反而是一种拖累，但看着它们，我又觉得自己是完整的。我觉得大家普遍都很排斥保留纪念物。但我知道它们力量强大。不过嘿，我是个艺术家。即使是惆怅、悲伤的回忆，对我来说也弥足珍贵。我还是和之前一样，扔掉的多，留下的少+

+虽然我知道自己还是留了“太多”。下一阶段将是实际搬运和储存阶段，到时候可能会再精简一些。这个阶段只是初筛，筛完之后，清理出来的东西就会交由他人全部运走。
归档于：如何搬离住了12年的家和生活了45年的故乡，这里还有着家族150年的根基（和文物）。我终于要离开了，去寻找一个符合我价值观的文化氛围。
#搬家记

搬家大作战，春假接力
第 1 天：
清空了主卧衣柜
和一整面墙的纸箱。
我正在盘点我的所有家当。挑出一小部分留下来。一些承载回忆的物件，还有开启新生活用得上的实用东西。我知道现阶段我挑出来的已经超出了我的实际需要，可能多到我都搬不动；但相比之下，我留下不带走的东西要多得多。等盘点完再决定留什么、放哪里。剩下的就全都留给那些“捡漏的人”啦。
#搬家记

第 2 天，周一，午间休息。
今天比昨天更难熬。我翻出了更多“有纪念意义”的东西。纠结的是：这些保存下来的回忆在现实中是个累赘，对我的未来没有任何实际帮助，反而是个负担；但看着它们，我又觉得内心很充实。我感觉，大家普遍都很排斥留着旧物。但我知道这些东西有着强大的力量。不过嘿，我是个艺术家。即使是惆怅、悲伤的回忆，对我来说也弥足珍贵。我还是像之前一样，留下的比扔掉的少+

+虽然我知道自己还是留了“太多”。下一阶段就是实际的搬运和存放了，到时候可能还会再删减一些。现在的阶段只是初筛，筛完之后，清理出来的东西就会交给别人全部拉走。
生活归档：如何搬离住了12年的家，和生活了45年的故乡——这里还有着我们家族150年的根基（和老物件）。我终于要走啦，去寻找一个契合我价值观的地方。
#搬家记

source_doc:
$partner has a video consult with Ikea to quote for a fitted kitchen. It's a fascinating glimpse into the ecosystem of online services for boomers.
1. They send link for video consult, three weeks ago. It uses Ikea's proprietary videoconf solution
2. They request the designs & 3D renders for the new kitchen
3. they send an email saying "thanks for sending through the design
4. We dial in today, they start the call with "our system blocked your files, let's design your kitchen together"
1/x

5. Partner asks if there's any way to share the (very detailed, took us like a full man week to put together) designs, but the Ikea salesdrone is on a script, and isn't having a bar of it.
6. The next step in the script is "laboriously do the design from scratch over the phone with the client, hunting and pecking on the keyboard and not fast using the UI of their design software"
2/x

7. They cannot share their screen, so it's a clown show of repeated misunderstanding about which part of which image is being referred to

8. the clock has just ticked past what should have been the full consult, and they're 35% the way thru getting the required measurements.

9. So far there's been literally 8 minutes of salesdrone laboriously inputting the measurements supplied

Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Chinese, Simplified grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is user-generated content from a social media platform. Do not reproduce spelling mistakes. Reproduce marks of expressiveness that communicate meaningful intent (e.g. enthusiasm through capitalisation or elongation) in a way that is natural in Chinese, Simplified. Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. Produce only the Chinese, Simplified translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Chinese, Simplified (zho_Hans):
hypo_0:
队友约了宜家的视频咨询，想给定制厨房估个价。这真让人大开眼界，可算是见识到针对老年人的在线服务生态系统了。
1. 三周前，他们发了视频咨询的链接。用的是宜家自己的专用视频会议软件
2. 他们要求提供新厨房的设计图和3D效果图
3. 他们发了封邮件说“感谢发送设计图”
4. 我们今天拨打进去，他们一上来就说“我们的系统拦截了您的文件，我们一起来重新设计您的厨房吧”
1/x

5. 队友问有没有办法分享那些设计图（非常详细，花了我俩整整一周才搞定），但宜家的销售客服只会照本宣科，根本不理这茬。
6. 话术的下一步是“在电话里和客户一起极其费劲地从头开始设计，在键盘上笨拙地单指禅打字，而且对自家设计软件的界面操作极慢”
2/x

7. 他们没法共享屏幕，所以就变成了针对某张图的某个部分进行反复误解的滑稽戏

8. 时间刚刚过去，本该是整个咨询结束的时候，但他们才完成了所需尺寸输入的35%。

9. 到目前为止，整整8分钟都是销售客服在极其费劲地输入提供的尺寸

hypothesis:
$partner约了宜家的视频咨询，想给定制厨房估个价。这真让人大开眼界，可算是见识到针对中老年人的在线服务系统有多奇葩了。
1. 三周前，他们发了视频咨询的链接。用的是宜家自家的视频会议软件
2. 他们要求提供新厨房的设计图和3D效果图
3. 他们发来一封邮件，写着“感谢发送设计图”
4. 我们今天连线进去，他们一上来就说“我们的系统拦截了您的文件，我们一起来重新设计您的厨房吧”
1/x

5. 队友问有没有办法分享那些设计图（非常详细，花了我俩整整一个星期才画好），但宜家的客服工具人只知道照本宣科，根本不接这茬。
6. 话术的下一步是“在电话里跟客户一起，极其费劲地从零开始画设计，在键盘上一指禅敲字，用起自家设计软件的界面来也慢得要死”
2/x

7. 他们没法共享屏幕，所以就成了大型翻车现场，双方对到底在说哪张图的哪个部分反反复复地产生误解

8. 咨询时间本来这时候应该已经全部结束了，但他们才录入了35%的尺寸数据。

9. 到目前为止，整整有8分钟都是客服工具人在极其费劲地输入我们提供的尺寸

source_doc:
They're narcissists.
They think the whole world revolves around them.
Everything is about them.
So if they cut you off, that's because they needed that spot more than you did.
And how dare you question that?
How dare you question that?
They made a move and they're the most important person.
Anyways, yeah, it is what it is, right?

source_doc:
I just saw Kendall Coyne Schofield in her jersey during warmups... is she playing today??? 🤩
#PWHL #hizzackySeason BOS at MIN

#PWHL #hizzackySeason
Whatever Heise did to put a Fleet player on her butt at center ice, that Fleet player paid back HARD 10 seconds later. Yeesh. 😬🫣
On the one hand, I want the Fleet's goalie's PWHL debut to go well, but on the other hand, I want the Frost to win.
Kendall Coyne Schofield was PISSED at the front of the net with that little stick scramble after the Fleet's second goal. I'm glad to have her fury back on the ice. She is ferocious!

#PWHL #hizzackySeason
Looks like Klees changed back to his regular first line and Kendall et al needed to get a MFing goal and they got that hot damn MF goal! YES

#PWHL #hizzackySeason
YES! THEY TIED THAT SHIT UP!
Nooooooo, the Fleet is back up.
Roller-coaster of a game, here!

#PWHL #hizzackySeason
Wowza, Fleet is *still* gunning for Heise. Yee-ouch. That's two Fleet penalties to that one center-ice unpenalized shove by Heise.

#PWHL #hizzackySeason
It is so so good to see Kendall Coyne Schofield parked back at the top of the crease, getting shoved around by women a head taller than her, yet pushing right back, making plays.

#PWHL #hizzackySeason
Crowd is not convinced from what we saw that Curl deserved a double minot for roughing.
Crowd is not happy about this illegal hit call against Fleet on 71's injury.
I don't think we got a single SOG in that last power play.
Boston's defense is just too good. They aren't giving us any openings.

hypo_0:
我刚刚在热身时看到肯德尔·科因·斯科菲尔德穿着球衣了……她今天上场吗？？？🤩
#PWHL #女子冰球赛季 波士顿对阵明尼苏达

#PWHL #女子冰球赛季
不管海丝在球场中央做了什么把急流队的队员撞得屁股着地，那名急流队队员在10秒后就狠狠地报复了回来。哎呀。😬🫣
一方面，我希望急流队守门员的PWHL首秀能顺利，但另一方面，我又希望冰霜队能赢。
在急流队打进第二个球后，肯德尔·科因·斯科菲尔德在球网前抢球时简直气炸了。很高兴能在冰场上再次看到她的怒火。她太凶猛了！

#PWHL #女子冰球赛季
看来克利斯换回了他常规的第一组阵容，肯德尔他们必须得进一个该死的球，然后他们就真TM进球了！太棒了

#PWHL #女子冰球赛季
太棒了！他们把比分扳平了！
不不不不，急流队又领先了。
这场比赛真是像坐过山车一样！

#PWHL #女子冰球赛季
哇哦，急流队*依然*在针对海丝。哎呦喂。海丝在球场中央的那一次没被判罚的推搡，换来了急流队的两次犯规处罚。

#PWHL #女子冰球赛季
能看到肯德尔·科因·斯科菲尔德重新守在球门区前沿真是太好了，虽然被比她高一个头的女队员们推来推去，但她依然强硬地推回去，组织进攻。

#PWHL #女子冰球赛季
从我们看到的画面来看，观众们不觉得库尔应该因为粗暴冲撞而被判双重轻罚。
对于急流队因为71号受伤而被判非法冲撞，观众们很不高兴。
我觉得我们在上一次多打少的时候一脚有效射门都没有。
波士顿的防守简直太好了。他们不给我们任何机会。

source_doc:
@hannorein@mastodon.social sooo, we’re tagging verified human content now for them to have a dataset with less slop to train on?
I don’t know, they should asphyxiate from their own barfed up slop mess they’ve created until their latent vector space converges to unity.

@helpsterTee @hannorein My first thought as well. I killed off my personal site since I didn't want to feed the various Torment Nexuses. Marking genuine human content just makes building new, unpoisoned and slop free data sets easier.
I thought about doing the opposite and building a "poison pot" for AI crawlers but my poor little server is not that beefy.

@CodingPhysicist@mstdn.social @hannorein@mastodon.social yeah, if we suffer, let them suffer.
If your employer stuffs AI in your daily routine, instead of resigning, use malicious compliance and apply it to totally mundane problems and embrace slightly-wrong answers while burning through corporate token credit to ruin quarterly performance.
I’m so fed up with this and they’re using it anyways against us, so let’s have a little fun, while we can 🫤
Edit: they’re making up numbers all the time and faking profits for a while now, the usage that’ll bankrupt your employer won’t place a dent at slop headquarters unprofitable scam business anyways or their forest burning slopetuum mobile.

hypo_0:
@hannorein@mastodon.social 所以说，我们现在给真人创作的内容贴标签，就是为了给他们提供一个垃圾更少的数据集来做训练？
我不知道该怎么说，他们就该被自己制造出来的这堆呕吐物一般的垃圾给憋死，直到他们的潜空间收敛到归一化。

@helpsterTee @hannorein 我第一时间也是这么想的。我已经关掉了我的个人网站，因为我不想去喂养那些各种各样的“折磨之源”（Torment Nexuses）。给真正的真人内容做标记，只会让构建那些全新的、未被污染且没有垃圾的数据集变得更轻松。
我曾想过反其道而行之，为AI爬虫建一个“毒罐子”，但我那可怜的小服务器配置实在不够用。

@CodingPhysicist@mstdn.social @hannorein@mastodon.social 没错，要痛苦大家一起痛苦。
如果你的老板硬要把AI塞进你的日常工作里，先别急着辞职，试着“恶意合规”——把它用在一些极其琐碎的问题上，欣然接受那些似是而非的错误答案，同时疯狂消耗公司的Token额度，把季度的业绩搞砸。
我真的对这玩意儿恶心透顶了，反正他们不管怎样都会用它来对付我们，所以趁现在还能找点乐子，就尽情玩一把呗 🫤

我真是无语了，他们就该被自己吐出来的这堆垃圾活活憋死，直到他们的潜在向量空间全部收敛到归一化。

@helpsterTee @hannorein 我第一时间也是这么想的。我已经关掉了我的个人网站，因为我不想去喂养那些各种各样的“折磨之源”（Torment Nexuses）。给真正的真人内容做标记，只会让构建那些未被污染、没有垃圾的全新数据集变得更容易。
我曾想过反其道而行之，给AI爬虫建一个“毒罐子”，但我那可怜的小服务器配置实在不够看。

@CodingPhysicist@mstdn.social @hannorein@mastodon.social 没错，要痛苦大家一起痛苦。
如果你的老板硬要把AI塞进你的日常工作里，先别急着辞职，试着“恶意合规”——把它用在一些极其琐碎的问题上，欣然接受那些似是而非的错误答案，同时疯狂消耗公司的Token额度，把季度业绩搞砸。
我真的对这玩意儿恶心透顶了，反正他们不管怎样都会用它来对付我们，所以趁现在还能找点乐子，就尽情玩一把呗 🫤
补充：反正他们一直都在瞎编数据、伪造利润，能让你老板破产的Token用量，对于那家制造垃圾、只赔不赚的骗子大本营，或者是他们那台烧毁森林的垃圾永动机来说，根本连根毛都伤不到。

source_doc:
Good Morning Worlds!
We are going to the tip this morning. It will clear some of the stuff we sorted yesterday from the drive. I don't think we can clear it all unless we took the trailer, but the trailer is full of steel for weighing in.
Later I might carry on packing tote crates.
#GoodMorningWorlds

Tip trip done, and another car load cleared out.
I have taken the new trailer axle, and trailer drive motor system, out of the scrap metal trailer load. That means we can get more scrap metal in there and also not accidentally weigh in the parts I want to keep.
I think, next, I will start moving the scrap steel from the back garden into the trailer so that it is ready to go.
Scrap steel prices are not very high at the moment but better than nothing, if I take enough of it in one go.
Still have to sort the non-ferrous scrap.

That thing when you are taking the rotten tyres off small, wide lawn tractor wheels....
Huge effort to unmount one side of the tyre, but it was really badly rusted tight on the other side of the rim.
In the time it took me to break the bead free, I'd forgotten I had already done the other side, and ended up with the rim free but completely inside the tyre!
I had to remount the tyre that side, and then work around it to get the rim out.
I had to cut up the inner tube to get that out too!
I wonder how many more tyres I need to unmount? Four done so far.

hypo_0:
大家早上好呀！
我们今天早上要去一趟垃圾填埋场。这样能把我们昨天整理出来、堆在车道上的一些东西清理掉。我觉得如果不拉上拖车的话，是没办法全部运走的，但拖车里现在塞满了准备拿去称重卖掉的废钢。
晚点我可能会继续往收纳箱里打包东西。
#GoodMorningWorlds

垃圾场跑完一趟啦，又清理掉了一整车的东西。
我把新的拖车车轴和拖车驱动电机系统从那堆废金属里拿出来了。这样我们就能装下更多废金属，而且也不会不小心把我想留着的东西也给称重卖了。
我想，接下来我要开始把后花园的废钢搬到拖车里，这样就准备就绪了。
现在的废钢价格不是很高，但一次性多拉点过去，总比没有强。
还得把有色金属废料给分类整理一下。

就是那种要把烂掉的轮胎从又小又宽的草坪拖拉机轮子上拆下来的感觉……
费了九牛二虎之力才把轮胎的一侧拆下来，但轮毂的另一侧生锈太严重，粘得死死的。
就在我好不容易把胎唇撬开的工夫，我居然忘了另一侧已经弄好了，结果最后轮毂是脱开了，但整整齐齐地套在了轮胎里面！
我不得不把那一侧的轮胎重新装回去，然后再想办法把轮毂弄出来。
为了把内胎拿出来，我还得把它给剪断！
不知道我还要拆多少个轮胎？目前已经搞定四个了。

大家早上好呀！
我们今天早上要去一趟垃圾站。这样能把昨天整理出来、堆在车道上的一些垃圾清掉。我觉得除非用挂车，不然很难一次性清完，但挂车现在装满了准备拿去称重卖钱的废钢。
晚点我可能会继续用收纳箱打包东西。
#GoodMorningWorlds

垃圾站跑完一趟啦，又清空了一车。
我把新的挂车轴和挂车驱动电机系统从那一挂车的废旧金属里拿了出来。这样我们就能多装点废铁，而且也不会不小心把我想留着的零件给卖了。
我想，接下来我要开始把后花园的废钢搬到挂车里，好准备出发。
现在的废钢价格不是很高，但一次性多拉点过去，总比没有强。
还得把有色金属废料也分类整理一下。

source_doc:
You went $0.06 over.
I need the $0.06.
But I only want $10 even.
You pumped 1006.
Then you should fix your pumps so they don't go so fast.
I'm on a fixed income, you know.
Lady, if you don't.

source_doc:
I just had a very nice #dream that I made friends with Lee Chaeyeon. I just started talking to her nand the next thing I know, I have stayed over her house (like when the French kidnapped me for Christmas) and she is telling me to go up stairs and "shuffle up a little bit" (her English was generally excellent) by which she meant "tidy up a little bit" to show her mom we were ready to eat.
She comes upstairs to "shuffle up" her room and starts making gestures to explain what she means ...
1/

(she was always so excited to see me in this dream) because I was taking my coat off instead of "shuffling up."
Then she indicates this little piece of paper and says she has left me an autograph but in return she wants this little trading card I made in second grade of "50 Spikes," a sonic knock-off, obviously with more spikes. (This card actually exists IRL BTW). I start explaining to her what it is and if she really wants it (she did) I at least needed a picture of her holding it.
2/

Partly because I would miss it, but also, otherwise no one would believe me that she had wanted this thing from me.
It was then I realized we still didn't have each others' phone numbers.
3/3

Reproduce marks of expressiveness that communicate meaningful intent (e.g. enthusiasm through capitalisation or elongation) in a way that is natural in Chinese, Simplified. Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. Produce only the Chinese, Simplified translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Chinese, Simplified (zho_Hans):
hypo_0:
我刚刚做了一个超级美妙的 #梦，梦里我和李彩演交了朋友。我刚开始和她聊天，接着不知怎么的，我就在她家住下了（就像以前圣诞节法国人把我“绑架”去他们家那样）。她让我上楼“shuffle up a little bit”（她英语整体说得贼溜），意思其实是“稍微收拾收拾”，好让她妈妈知道我们准备好开饭了。
她也上楼来“shuffle”她自己的房间，然后开始比手画脚地解释她的意思……
1/

（在梦里她每次见到我都超级兴奋），因为我当时正在脱外套，而不是在“收拾”。
接着，她指着一小张纸，说给我留了签名，但作为交换，她想要我二年级时做的一张小卡片——画的是“50 Spikes”，一个盗版的索尼克，显然身上的刺更多。（顺便说一句，这张卡片在现实中是真的存在的）。我开始跟她解释这是啥，并说如果她真的想要（她确实想要），我起码得拍一张她拿着这张卡的照片。
2/

部分原因是我会舍不得这张卡，但也是因为，要不然根本没人会相信她居然会想要我的这个小玩意儿。
也就是在那个时候，我突然意识到我们居然还没有交换电话号码。
3/3

hypo_7:
我刚刚做了一个超美的 #梦，梦到自己和李彩演交了朋友。我才刚开始和她聊天，一眨眼，我就住到她家里了（就像那次圣诞节我被法国人“绑架”去过节一样）。她让我上楼“shuffle up a little bit”（她英语整体上其实超级好），她的意思是“稍微收拾一下”，好让她妈妈知道我们准备好开饭了。
她也上楼来“shuffle”她自己的房间，还开始比划手势来解释她的意思……
1/

（梦里她每次见到我都超级兴奋），因为我当时光顾着脱外套，根本没在“收拾”。
接着，她指了指一小张纸，说给我留了签名，但作为交换，她想要我小学二年级时做的一张集换卡，上面画的是“50 Spikes”——一个山寨版的索尼克，身上的刺显然更多。（顺便说一句，这张卡片在现实中是真的存在哦）。我开始跟她解释这是个啥，还说如果她真的想要（她确实想要），我起码得拍一张她拿着这张卡片的照片。
2/

3/3

I'm being weird.
But you.
Oh, I'm not too worried about that.
Being with you just now is so nice.
I mean, taking a trip to a regular grocery store with a regular guy.
In a regular limo?
Yeah, but it felt good to spend the afternoon.
That had nothing to do with the record business.
I mean, to get away from all those people who only act nice to you because they want something.
You run into a lot of those, huh?
Yeah.
Even my grandmother sends me demo tapes.
So what were you afraid was weird?

I am waiting, professor.
Well, what do you see in my hand?
I see the hand of a of a charming young man.
Within the next few months Lord Arthur will go on a voyage.
Naturally, his honeymoon.

Can you tell us any more?
No, Lady Clementine.
That's all I can say.

source_doc:
Progress after a while off. I got the sewing machine out to do the bill and a crown seam. Half the crown sewn plus the bill, resting atop the paper form made from the pattern. I had to rip and re-sew the machine stitch because I pinned along instead of across the seam and went off track. I might re-do the bill if I want a little more depth.
#millinery

Eight crown panels and two bill panels assembled into three pieces and pinned for general shape. Sachi's Studio Newsboy Cap pattern in green velvet. Mostly machine stitched.
The pattern calls for topstitching along the seams of the crown panels, which might suggest either matching or contrasting thread.
#millinery

Top view before I sew the crown halves together. Reviewing the how-to video. I see Sachi is using a few tiny spring clips during sewing instead of pinning the whole seam.

A bit of a messy join on the eight panels coming together at the peak of the newsboy cap, so I am thinking a larger button may be in order to disguise the seams.

Crown fully pieced, with cloth covered.button at peak. Raw edges loosely tucked under. Seams neither pressed nor topstitched.
#millinery

Reproduce marks of expressiveness that communicate meaningful intent (e.g. enthusiasm through capitalisation or elongation) in a way that is natural in Chinese, Simplified. Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. hypo_0:
歇了了一阵子之后终于有进展啦。我拿出缝纫机缝了帽檐和一条帽冠接缝。缝好了半个帽冠和帽檐，把它们搭在用纸样做好的纸模上。之前因为我是顺着接缝别别针，而不是横着别，结果缝歪了，只能拆掉用缝纫机重新缝。如果想要帽檐再深一点的话，我可能还会重做一下帽檐。
#制帽 #手工帽

八块帽冠片和两块帽檐片组合成了三个部件，用别针别出大致的形状。用绿色天鹅绒做的 Sachi's Studio 报童帽版型。大部分是用缝纫机缝的。
纸样要求沿着帽冠片的接缝压线，感觉可以用同色线，也可以用撞色线。
#制帽 #手工帽

把左右两半帽冠缝合前的顶部视角。正在复习教学视频。我看到 Sachi 在缝纫时用的是几个小弹簧夹，而不是把整条缝都用别针别起来。

报童帽顶部八块布片相接的地方缝得有点乱，所以我在想是不是该用个大点的纽扣来遮一下接缝。

帽冠完全拼好啦，顶部装了包布纽扣。毛边松松地折在里面。接缝既没熨烫也没压线。
#制帽 #手工帽

搁置了一阵子，终于又有点进展啦。我搬出缝纫机，准备缝帽檐和一条帽冠接缝。缝好了半个帽冠和帽檐，暂时搭在按版型做好的纸模上。之前因为别针是顺着接缝方向别的，而不是横着别，结果缝歪了，只好拆掉重缝。如果想要帽檐再深一点，我可能还会重做一下帽檐。
#手工制帽

八块帽冠片和两块帽檐片组合成了三个部分，用别针固定出了大致的形状。用绿色天鹅绒做的 Sachi's Studio 报童帽版型。大部分是机缝的。
版型要求沿着帽冠片的接缝压明线，感觉可以用同色线，也可以用撞色线。
#手工制帽

把左右两半帽冠缝合前的顶部俯视图。正在复习教学视频。我看到 Sachi 在缝纫时用的是几个超小号弹簧夹，而不是用别针别住整条缝。

报童帽顶部八块布片相接的地方缝得有点乱，所以我在想是不是该用个大一点的包头纽扣来遮一下接缝。

帽冠完全拼好啦，顶部装了包布纽扣。毛边松松地折在里面。接缝既没熨平也没压明线。
#手工制帽

纸样要求沿着帽顶片的拼接处压明线，感觉可以用同色线，也可以用撞色线。

source_doc:
No, because you can't just say you want a divorce after so many years, and then you keep quiet.
Why now?
Why not now?
Tell me why not now?
Out.
Okay, fine.
I'll tell you.
I don't want to be in a loveless marriage anymore.
What?
You don't find it so.
No.
Okay.
Tell me, when did we meet?

source_doc:
As head of this house, I shall arrange for an immediate investigation.
I'd rather not, if you don't mind, sir.
Doctor Sexton, the fact that my brother and sister and I have opened our home to convalescent patients doesn't relieve us of all responsibility for what occurs in it.
I mean, under the peculiar circumstances.
Oh, come along, Bob.
There's no need to shield anyone.

source_doc:
Oh, you want that car to disappear?
Huh?
No, no no no.
We just need the front right paneling thingy fixed.
Yeah.
A little fender bender.
Yeah, and we need it right away.
Sunny.
She knows my name.
No, no, no, I'm actually in my mid 40s.
I call everybody sunny.

source_doc:
Reading Gloria Steinem's undercover report on being a Playboy Bunny... finished Part I and damn🤔
Despite being well aware of Playboy being uh... a CORPORATION lol... had no idea how much their entire infrastructure truly served to perpetuate classism in an extremely creepy way while outwardly presenting themselves as the "classy" and thus "more ethical" option compared to say, Hustler

I'll post some screenshots later but to give you the gist, Bunnies (who were cocktail waitresses), had to:
- accept lower (by $200-150, equivalent to today's $2.5K) wages than advertised
- hand over 50% of all their tips
- give their last names to "Number 1 key holders" (ergo, celebrities/elites) if asked
- be subjected to a pelvic exam and blood test but weren't allowed to pick the physician
- be spied on by a private eye
- go out if their way to hide their husbands/bfs

The central point that unites all of this:
Bunnies were STRICTLY NOT ALLOWED TO (penalized by termination) date any other employees or customers... BUT accompanying and dating the "Number 1 key holders" was permitted, if not encouraged. See where this is going?

New recruits were given a "Bunny Bible" to study all those bizarre rules and instructions from.
To mention a few more:
- Bunnies' work performance was assessed by a "merit system" (YES, that exact wording!) instead of being written up. Unsurprisingly, merit was not only judged by a good work ethic but also very specific requirements on looks and attitude.
- there was an incentive system in place that rewarded Bunnies who sold the most liquor and merchandise

The original text is user-generated content from a social media platform. Do not reproduce spelling mistakes. Reproduce marks of expressiveness that communicate meaningful intent (e.g. enthusiasm through capitalisation or elongation) in a way that is natural in Chinese, Simplified. Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. Produce only the Chinese, Simplified translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Chinese, Simplified (zho_Hans):
hypo_0:
正在读葛罗莉亚·斯泰纳姆（Gloria Steinem）当花花公子女郎的卧底报告……刚读完第一部分，我勒个去🤔
虽然我早就知道花花公子是个……大资本公司，哈哈……但真没想到他们的整个体系居然是以如此令人毛骨悚然的方式来助长阶级主义的，而他们表面上还把自己包装得比《好色客》之流更“高雅”，因而是“更合乎道德”的选择

晚点我发几张截图，不过先给你们概括一下，女郎们（其实就是鸡尾酒女侍）必须：
- 接受比宣传的要低（少200到150美元，相当于今天的2500美金）的工资
- 上交50%的小费
- 如果被问起，必须把自己的姓氏告诉“1号钥匙持有者”（也就是名人/精英们）
- 接受盆腔检查和抽血，但不能自己选医生
- 被私家侦探监视
- 想方设法隐瞒自己有老公/男朋友的事实

而把所有这些串联起来的核心点就是：
女郎们是绝对不被允许（违者开除）和任何其他员工或顾客约会的……但是，陪伴“1号钥匙持有者”并与他们约会是被允许、甚至是被鼓励的。看出这路数了吧？

新新人会拿到一本《女郎圣经》，用来学习所有那些奇葩的规则和指令。
再随便说几个：
- 女郎们的工作表现是用一套“绩效系统”（没错，就是这个词！）来考核的，而不是直接记过。不出所料，考核标准不仅看工作态度，还对长相和姿态有着极其具体的要求。
- 还有一套激励机制，奖励那些卖出最多酒水和周边商品的女郎

- 兔女郎的工作表现是用一套“绩效系统”（没错，原话就是这个词！）来考核的，而不是记过。不出所料，这个“绩效”不仅看工作态度，还对长相和举止有着极其具体的要求。
- 还有一套激励机制，专门奖励那些卖出最多酒水和周边商品的兔女郎
hypo_7:
正在看葛罗莉亚·斯泰纳姆当花花公子兔女郎的卧底报告……刚看完第一部分，我勒个去🤔
虽然早就知道花花公子是个……大资本公司，哈哈……但真没想到他们的整个底层架构居然在用一种极度猥琐的方式来固化阶级偏见，而他们表面上还把自己包装得很“高端”，搞得好像比《好色客》之流“更有底线”一样

晚点我发几张截图，先跟你们说个大概，兔女郎们（其实就是鸡尾酒女招待）必须：
- 接受比招聘广告上低了150到200刀（相当于现在的2500刀）的工资
- 上交整整50%的小费
- 被问起时，必须把自己的姓氏告诉“1号钥匙持有者”（也就是名人/精英阶层）
- 接受妇科检查和抽血，而且还不准自己选医生
- 被私家侦探暗中监视
- 想方设法隐瞒自己有老公或男朋友的事实

而把所有这些串联起来的核心点就是：
兔女郎是严禁（违者直接开除）和任何其他员工或顾客约会的……但是，陪同“1号钥匙持有者”并和他们约会却是被允许、甚至是被鼓励的。看出这其中的猫腻了吧？

So this little room right here needs to be cleaned out.
I need to throw away a bunch of stuff.
There's a bunch of stuff left in there from the previous owners of this house, and I've never really gone through it.
So what better time than right now with the world watching?
Kind of a mess in here?
Turn on the light.
You can see there's a couple of shelves there with some things on them.
Yeah, I've been meaning to clean this up for quite some time and it is time.
So here is some kind of a case.
I'll bet you anything I know exactly what this is.

source_doc:
i am hesitant to declare it but i may be right around the point of behavior calculation optimization where there's nothing more that can be done without actually decimating the number of paths being processed.
And that might actually be the play because things like UCT are smarter about traversing a tree with a budget and splitting how deep vs broad you go

at the end of the day, it's always going to be possible that some enemy picks up some combination of abilities/items where the combinatorial explosion of possibility space is unable to calculate fast on any hardware, so I was always going to need to cap it somewhere, just that theoretical cap is now 40x bigger than it was in january

Welp think I'm going to implement UCT because my game's just Go now this is going to be a journey

hypo_0:
我有点不敢打包票，但我现在的行为计算优化可能已经到瓶颈了。如果不去切实削减正在处理的路径数量，估计很难再有什么提升了。
不过这可能确实是个路子，因为像 UCT（上限置信区间算法）这类东西在有预算限制的情况下遍历树会更聪明，能更好地权衡深度和广度的分配。

说到底，有些敌人总归有可能会拿到某种技能/道具组合，导致可能性空间的组合爆炸在任何硬件上都无法快速计算，所以我迟早得设个上限，只是现在的理论上限已经比一月份时提高了 40 倍。

额，我想我要开始实现 UCT 了，因为我的游戏现在简直变成围棋了，这下有得折腾喽

不过这可能确实是条明路，因为像 UCT 这种算法在有预算限制的情况下遍历树会更聪明，能更好地权衡深度和广度的分配。

source_doc:
They got so many trains out there, they got a hard time keeping them running into each other.
Got trains going every which way.
Got people on all of them.
Somebody going, well, somebody just left.
I believe everybody stayed in one place.
This be a better world.
Now.
What I done learnt in 27 years of railroading is this.

source_doc:
:redpanda: sometimes people will ask us like "what if you got a publisher for [game] wouldn't that be wicked?" but the problem is that all that would have to go through our game director, Ashe, who's said she wont speak to any publisher who doesn't address her as Ashe
the second she gets "Jess" the deal ends

:redpanda: and in a world where like, not even the AI slop publishers sending AI emails, but the people who have been flat out rude and some of them like, you could *feel* the misogyny dripping off their email, we're not really interested in talking to any of them lol

:redpanda: (I will shout out the publishers who have reached out to us though who have been like "here's some of the games we've published" and, out of their catalog, they picked out exclusively furry games. at least they did their homework)

:redpanda: anyways if you ever were like "I don't understand why Blobun isn't on switch? it'd be a perfect fit" that's why, and we can't afford the devkit and version of gamemaker that does that export, so yea you gotta go steam deck (or x86-ARM converter on those anbernics) if you want it on the go

hypo_0:
:redpanda: 有时候大家会问我们“要是你们给[游戏]找个发行商，那不就牛逼了？”但问题是，所有这些事儿都得经过我们的游戏制作人 Ashe。她已经放话了，哪个发行商要是不用 Ashe 这个名字称呼她，她就拒绝沟通。
只要听到对方叫一声“Jess”，这合作就直接泡汤。

:redpanda: 而且在这个世道，别说那些用 AI 垃圾群发邮件的发行商了，就是有些真人发来的邮件，态度也极其无礼，你甚至能*感受到*字里行间溢出来的对女性的蔑视。说实话，我们根本没兴趣跟这帮人废话，哈哈。

:redpanda: （不过我得给一些主动联系过我们的发行商点个赞，他们会说“这是我们发行过的一些游戏”，而且在他们的游戏列表里，挑出来的全都是兽人（furry）游戏。至少人家是真的做足了功课的）

:redpanda: 反正要是你们之前纳闷“为什么 Blobun 没上 Switch 呀？这游戏跟 Switch 简直是绝配”，这就是原因。我们买不起开发机，也买不起支持导出 Switch 版本的 Gamemaker，所以没办法啦，想随时随地玩的话，还是得用 Steam Deck（或者在那些安伯尼克开源掌机上用 x86-ARM 转换器）。

We're at the beach.
And this is the river teller.
And the town is called teller as well.
But you don't want to swim in there because there's crocs.
But if we're lucky, we might see some crocs today.
That would be awesome.
Would be awesome.
It's more than one person I've heard doing that noise.
Man, the pigeons really like it.
Here.
Look at this.
Oh my goodness.
Oh, Jesus.
Wow.
So many.
here.
Yeah, we're nearly there.
Beach resort coming soon.

source_doc:
@Edent ah, interesting - was the Hub 5 something you had to request from Virgin, or did you just get one elsewhere and set it up? (As per recent discussion was issued with a 5x, with its lack Modem Mode.)

@yvan I already had the Hub 4. I went onto their online chat and whinged about poor download speeds until they sent me a new Hub.
If you're on the XPON network, I don't think you have a choice though.

@Edent ah yeah, just been trying to do some research, but it's all a bit muddy... I'm FTTP/XGS-PON so I think just stuck with the 5x... not an insurmountable problem, just a little annoying. (But compared to unreliable <40mpbs BT rotting fenland copper that cost me more than Virgin... I'm not really complaining.)

@yvan 我本来用的是Hub 4。然后我去他们在线客服那儿一通抱怨网速太慢，直到他们给我寄了个新Hub。
不过如果你是在XPON网络上，我估计你没得选。

@Edent 啊对，我刚才也查了一下，但网上说得都挺含糊的……我是FTTP/XGS-PON，所以估计只能用5x了……也不是啥解决不了的大问题，就是有点烦人。（不过比起之前BT那不靠谱、网速还不到40mbps的沼泽地烂铜线，而且收费比Virgin还贵……我已经不怎么抱怨了。）

source_doc:
Don't you have these exact same shoes?
Excuse me, but these have a pearlized finish.
The other ones are patent leather.
What's wrong with patent leather?
They were like screaming 1995.
It was totally embarrassing.
That's it.
Shoes do not scream.
What year it is.
The shopping addiction of yours has got to stop.
But, daddy.
From now on, no more pit stops on rodeo.
No visits to the mall, no little hikes along Melrose.

source_doc:
Relentless Clan power past Steelers in statement home win

The Clan got off to a strong start with Joe Hazeldine slamming a first-time shot into the Sheffield net after some nice slip passing between Hugo Roy and Deven Sideroff.

Despite some strong defensive play from Glasgow, the Steelers found a breakthrough via Brien Diffley's sharp shooting through traffic before Mikko Juusola gave the visitors the lead with a deflected shot from right wing.

In the second period, the Clan saw momentum swing their way with Steven Seigo slipping a tidy finish from close-range past Matthew Greenfield to tie the game up.

Shortly after, Rylan Schwartz grabbed a go-ahead goal with a bullet from the backdoor after some luck with the Clan avoiding a too many men call.

Sheffield forced their way back into the game with Ryan Tait driving on net and backhanding a shot which Brine saved but didn't keep hold of as Kevin Tansey poked a third goal over the line for the visitors.

With the score line tied going into the final frame, the noise peaked inside Braehead and Glasgow gained control of the game.

Tristin Langan saw retribution for the ongoing battle he had to put up with throughout the game with Mitchell Heard as he cracked the bar with a beautiful finish to give his side the lead.

A holding penalty on Miihkali Teppo applied pressure to the hosts' advantage late on with the Steelers pulling their netminder for the extra attacker.

Langan grabbed his second of the game on the empty net though to round off the night with a well-earned and much-needed two points for the Clan on home ice.

Glasgow Clan head coach, Corey Neilson said after the game: "We were the better team. Our forecheck was excellent, that's something we've worked on all week and it was relentless tonight. The identity we were looking for is starting to show. It was really enjoyable to coach with full lines and take advantage of a team that's playing short, because usually we're on the other side of that."

Sheffield Steelers head coach, Aaron Fox, said: "I thought we were pretty good for the majority of the game. Glasgow jumped on us early, but our bounce back was good. Our guys were gassed by the end, we only had three lines but we were in the battle all game, I can't fault the compete level of our guys."
instruction: You are a professional Chinese, Simplified translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Chinese, Simplified (zho_Hans). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Chinese, Simplified grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is a news article. Ensure the translation is formal and consistent with journalistic standards. Produce only the Chinese, Simplified translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Chinese, Simplified (zho_Hans):
hypo_0:
克兰队主场大捷势不可挡，轻取斯蒂勒斯队彰显实力

克兰队开局势头强劲，雨果·罗伊与德文·西德罗夫精妙传切配合后，乔·哈泽尔丁迎球怒射，皮球直挂谢菲尔德队网窝。

尽管格拉斯哥队防守顽强，但斯蒂勒斯队仍找到了突破口，布里恩·迪夫利在人丛中一脚劲射穿透防线，随后米科·尤索拉右路起脚，球折射入网，帮助客队反超比分。

下半场，克兰队夺回场上主动权，史蒂文·塞戈近距离巧射战胜马修·格林菲尔德，将比分扳平。

此后不久，克兰队因裁判未判罚其场上人数超标而逃过一劫，赖兰·施瓦茨抓住机会，在后门柱附近爆射破门，将比分反超。

谢菲尔德队不甘示弱展开反击，赖安·泰特带球突入禁区后反手射门，尽管布林将球挡出但未能抱稳，凯文·坦西顺势补射，为客队攻入第三球，再度追平比分。

带着平局进入最后一节，布雷黑德竞技场的呐喊声达到顶点，格拉斯哥队逐渐掌控了比赛节奏。

整场比赛饱受米切尔·赫德缠斗的特里斯坦·兰根终于迎来回报，他一记极具观赏性的射门击中横梁下沿入网，帮助球队再度领先。

比赛尾声阶段，米哈卡利·特波因抱人犯规受罚，给主队的领先优势带来不小压力，斯蒂勒斯队随即撤下门将，派上额外进攻球员放手一搏。

然而，兰根抓住机会推射空门得手，梅开二度，为克兰队锁定了这场来之不易且至关重要的主场胜利，全取两分。

格拉斯哥克兰队主教练科里·尼尔森在赛后表示：“我们是表现更好的一方。我们的前场逼抢非常出色，这是我们本周一直在练的战术，今天整场比赛大家都贯彻得很坚决。我们所追求的团队风格正开始展现。能用完整的阵容指挥比赛，并利用对手阵容不整的劣势，这种感觉很好，因为通常我们才是缺兵少将的那一方。”

谢菲尔德斯蒂勒斯队主教练亚伦·福克斯表示：“我认为我们在比赛的大部分时间里表现得相当不错。格拉斯哥队在开局阶段给了我们迎头痛击，但我们的调整和反弹很好。到比赛结束时，队员们的体能已经消耗殆尽，我们只有三条线可以轮换，但大家整场比赛都在顽强拼搏，我无法苛责队员们的斗志。”
hypo_1:
克兰队攻势如潮主场掀翻钢人队，强势一役彰显实力

比赛伊始，克兰队便反客为主，雨果·罗伊与德文·西德罗夫完成精妙小范围传切配合，随后乔·哈泽尔丁一记不停球直接怒射，将球狠狠砸入谢菲尔德队的网窝。

尽管格拉斯哥队防守强硬，但钢人队还是找到了突破口，先是布里恩·迪夫利在人丛中起脚冷射穿透防线，随后米科·尤索拉在右翼起脚，球折射入网，帮助客队反超比分。

谢菲尔德钢人队主教练亚伦·福克斯表示：“我认为我们在比赛的大部分时间里表现得相当不错。格拉斯哥队在开局阶段给了我们迎头痛击，但我们的调整和反弹很好。到比赛结束时，队员们的体能已经彻底透支，我们只有三条线可以轮换，但大家整场比赛都在顽强拼搏，我无法苛责队员们的拼搏精神。”
hypo_3:
克兰队攻势如潮主场掀翻钢人队，强势一役彰显实力

比赛伊始，克兰队便反客为主。雨果·罗伊与德文·西德罗夫完成精妙的小范围传切配合，随后乔·哈泽尔丁接球直接一脚怒射，将球狠狠砸入谢菲尔德队的网窝。

尽管格拉斯哥队防守强硬，但钢人队还是找到了突破口，先是布里恩·迪夫利在人丛中起脚冷射穿透防线，随后米科·尤索拉在右翼起脚，球经折射入网，帮助客队反超比分。

进入第二节，克兰队夺回场上主动权，史蒂文·塞戈在门前近距离冷静巧射，骗过马修·格林菲尔德，将比分扳平。

此后不久，克兰队因裁判未判罚其场上人数超标而逃过一劫。大难不死的克兰队随即由赖兰·施瓦茨在后门柱接球，轰出一记旱地拔葱的劲射，将比分反超。

谢菲尔德队见状发起反击，赖安·泰特带球直插球门并反手射门，尽管布林将球扑出，但未能稳稳抱住，凯文·坦西顺势将球捅过球门线，为客队攻入第三球，再度追平比分。

带着平局进入决胜节，布雷黑德竞技场内的呐喊声震耳欲聋，格拉斯哥队趁势掌控了比赛节奏。

整场比赛饱受米切尔·赫德缠斗的特里斯坦·兰根终于迎来回报，他以一记极为舒展的射门击中横梁下沿入网，帮助球队再度领先。

比赛尾声阶段，米哈卡利·特波因抱人犯规受罚，主队的领先优势面临严峻考验。钢人队随即撤下门将，派上额外进攻球员放手一搏。

然而，兰根抓住机会推射空门得手，梅开二度的同时也锁定了胜局，为克兰队在主场拼下了这两分至关重要且实至名归的积分。

格拉斯哥克兰队主教练科里·尼尔森在赛后表示：“我们是表现更好的一方。我们的前场逼抢非常出色，这是我们本周一直在重点演练的战术，今天大家贯彻得极其坚决。我们所追求的团队风格正开始展现。能用完整的轮换阵容指挥比赛，并利用对手阵容不整的劣势，这种感觉很好，因为通常我们才是缺兵少将的那一方。”

谢菲尔德钢人队主教练亚伦·福克斯表示：“我认为我们在比赛的大部分时间里表现得相当不错。格拉斯哥队在开局阶段给了我们迎头痛击，但我们的调整和反弹很好。到比赛结束时，队员们的体能已经彻底透支，我们只有三条线可以轮换，但大家整场比赛都在顽强拼搏，我无法苛责队员们的拼搏精神。”

格拉斯哥克兰队主教练科里·尼尔森在赛后表示：“我们是表现更好的一方。我们的前场逼抢非常出色，这是我们本周一直在重点演练的战术，今天大家贯彻得极其坚决。我们所追求的团队风格正开始展现。能用完整的轮换阵容指挥比赛，并利用对手阵容不整的劣势，这种感觉很好，因为通常我们才是缺兵少将的那一方。”

谢菲尔德钢人队主教练亚伦·福克斯表示：“我认为我们在比赛的大部分时间里表现得相当不错。格拉斯哥队在开局阶段给了我们迎头痛击，但我们的调整和反弹很好。到比赛结束时，队员们的体能已经彻底透支，我们只有三条线可以轮换，但大家整场比赛都在顽强拼搏，我无法苛责队员们的拼搏精神。”

source_doc:
Oh, great.
Here comes Jade.
Can we sit somewhere else?
Nope.
Fine.
We'll sit with the girl who can't keep her mouth shut and got you fired.
Beck, I swear, if there was anything I could do to make it up to you, I would.
I bet you would.

source_doc:
@la Isn't rule #1 of machining that if you haven't faced it off, it's not square or flat?

@azonenberg yes, of course, but I *did* mean to face it off. I just had my tool zero set wrong.
Because I assumed that it was roughtly flat.
I'm making an extra part today. I have the stock. And if I don't it will bug me to no end. Plus, during test fitting the bearing I broke the glue holding the part on my plate, so I would have to indicate it back in anyways, which I don't wanna dooooo, so.....

@la I know the feeling.
Had a similar problem when working on my house where literally every datum you might think of using was wrong.
I had a contractor frame a door frame plumb and square. Had to rip out a couple of studs after he left because the door needed to be like a degree off level in order to be flush with the floor and not floating in the air on one side.
Another (partial height) wall has each stud carefully cut to length because no two are the same size... The floor isn't flat so to make the countertop level you need the wall to be a parallelogram rather than a rectangle

@la 机加工的第一准则难道不是：只要还没端面铣削过，它就既不方也不平吗？

@azonenberg 确实是这样，但我*本来*是打算铣端面的。我只是对刀零点设错了。
因为我以为它大概是平的。
我今天得多做一个配件。材料是有的。而且要是不做的话，我心里会一直疙瘩得要命。再加上测试装配轴承的时候，把板上粘配件的胶给弄断了，所以反正我也得重新校对，但我真的不想弄啊啊啊，所以……

@la 我懂这种感觉。
之前我装修房子时也遇到过类似的问题，简直每一个你觉得能当基准的地方都是歪的。
我让包工头把一个门框装得又垂直又方正。结果他一走我就不得不拆掉几根立柱，因为那门得偏个1度左右才能和地面贴合，否则有一边就会悬空。
还有一面（半高）墙，每根立柱都得仔细裁剪长度，因为没有两根是一样长的……地面不平，所以为了让台面水平，墙体得做成平行四边形，而不是长方形

source_doc:
Once upon a time in a kingdom of great beauty.
There was a beast of a property market.
We have seen 40 houses.
The market's just too fast.
Prices are realistic.
If only there was a fearless hero to save the day.
I could kiss you.
Or a fairy godmother.
To make dreams come true.
Oh, angel.
But we live in the real world.
They'll just have to make do with us.
We're back.

hypo_0:
从前，在一个美丽的国度里。
有一个怪兽般的房地产市场。
我们已经看过了40套房子。
市场变化实在太快了。
价格符合实际。
要是有一位无畏的英雄来拯救世界就好了。
我都想吻你了。
或者有一位仙女教母。
来让梦想成真。
哦，天使。
但我们生活在现实世界中。
他们只能将就着选择我们了。
我们回来了。

Sure.

Yes, I have.

Yes, if I'm allowed to.
Okay, let's start all over.
Sit down.
Tell me about yourself.

Really?

source_doc:
And being one of the weirdo, we just frequently get attacks here and there. Either online, offline, or even from your closest people. Those attacks usually stem from homophobia, transphobia, or sometimes just, don't like how weird we are and how weird we act, especially furries that do deeper immersions like roleplaying and therianthropy.

Hence some of us got safety by not needing to tell who we are and where we were from. Some of us got safety by only revealing ourselves to our friends or close friends. Face/body reveal is a culture that most of the furries did at least once in a private post, whether it be "delete soon" kind of post or in story.

Despite being so, we're still open for social interactions offline. We do furmeets—a personal meeting between furries, be it in a group or personal, be it in an event or just casually—and sometimes making a con/fur on, such as MWFF, IWAG, PAWAI, FURUM, and so on. It's fun to meet them offline, get to know each other, be able to see them in person as most of us have never seen each other's faces, take a photo to keep personally and censor publicly, laugh together and discuss similar interests, and so on. It's fun, social, and warm.

Although, things don't feel the same today. As people start trying to strip anonymity of people, attack furries, therian, LGBTQIA, and dox them, as how also our community participate and stir the dramas inside, things has been a little more chaotic, less warm, and less feeling like community or family. It's not the same anymore.

Part of me hopes things can return to how it feels in the 2000s and 2010s, but, I'll just let God do the rest. I'm a little hopeless in society and humans. I'm tired of how things get worse and meant to attack and divide small communities into a hopeless being. I don't like how society is now no longer respecting and being in unity.
instruction: You are a professional Chinese, Simplified translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Chinese, Simplified (zho_Hans). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Chinese, Simplified grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is user-generated content from a social media platform. Do not reproduce spelling mistakes. Reproduce marks of expressiveness that communicate meaningful intent (e.g. enthusiasm through capitalisation or elongation) in a way that is natural in Chinese, Simplified. Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. Produce only the Chinese, Simplified translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Chinese, Simplified (zho_Hans):
hypo_0:
作为怪人之一，我们经常在各个地方受到攻击。不管是线上、线下，甚至是来自你最亲近的人。那些攻击通常源于恐同、恐跨，或者有时候只是单纯不喜欢我们有多怪、行为有多怪，尤其是那些沉浸感更深的兽迷，比如玩角色扮演和兽祖/兽魂认同（therianthropy）的。

因此，我们中的一些人选择不透露自己是谁、来自哪里，以此来获得安全感。有些人则只向朋友或密友公开身份，以此来保护自己。露脸或露身材是大多数兽迷至少会在私密动态里做一次的事，不管是那种“阅后即焚”的帖子还是发在限时动态里。

尽管如此，我们对线下的社交互动依然持开放态度。我们会举办兽聚（furmeet）——也就是兽迷之间的私人聚会，不管是群聚还是面基，不管是在活动中还是日常随便聚聚——有时还会举办兽展/兽会，比如 MWFF、IWAG、PAWAI、FURUM 等等。在线下和大家见面、结识彼此、见到真人真的很开心，因为我们大多数人以前都没见过对方长啥样。我们可以拍张照片自己留存，公开时打上马赛克，一起大笑、聊聊共同的兴趣等等。真的很开心、很热闹、很温暖。

不过，现在感觉不一样了。随着人们开始试图扒掉别人的匿名外衣、攻击并人肉兽迷、兽祖和 LGBTQIA 群体，再加上我们社群内部也有人参与和挑起各种八卦是非，事情变得有点更加混乱了，没那么温暖了，也越来越没有社群或大家庭的感觉了。已经不再和以前一样了。

我心里其实有一部分希望一切能回到 2000 年代和 2010 年代的那种感觉，但是，还是顺其自然吧。我对这个社会和人类有点绝望了。我已经厌倦了事情变得越来越糟，也厌倦了那些旨在攻击和分裂小众群体、让人陷入绝望的手段。我不喜欢现在的社会不再懂得尊重、不再团结的样子。
hypo_1:
作为怪人之一，我们经常在各个地方挨打挨骂。不管是线上、线下，甚至是来自你最亲近的人。那些攻击通常源于恐同、恐跨，或者有时候纯粹就是看不惯我们有多怪、行为有多怪，尤其是那些玩得更深、比如搞角色扮演和兽祖认同（therianthropy）的兽迷。

所以，我们中有些人选择隐姓埋名，不透露自己是谁、来自哪里，以此来求个安全。有些人则只向朋友或闺蜜死党公开身份。露脸或露身材算是一种圈内文化了，大多数兽迷至少都会在私密动态里发过一次，不管是那种“等下就删”的帖子还是发在限时动态里。

尽管如此，我们对线下的面基依然持开放态度。我们会搞兽聚（furmeet）——也就是兽迷之间的私人聚会，不管是面基还是群聚，不管是在展会上还是随便约个饭——有时还会办兽展，比如 MWFF、IWAG、PAWAI、FURUM 等等。在线下和大家见面、结识彼此、见到真人真的很开心，毕竟我们大多数人以前都没见过对方长啥样。我们可以拍张照片自己留着，发网上时打个码，一起哈哈大笑、聊聊共同的兴趣爱好什么的。真的很有意思，很有氛围，也很温暖。

不过，现在感觉变味了。随着大家开始试图扒掉别人的马甲、攻击并开盒肉人肉兽迷、兽祖和 LGBTQIA 群体，再加上我们圈子内部也有人天天吃瓜撕逼、带节奏，事情变得有点越来越乱了，没那么温暖了，也越来越没有大家庭的感觉了。早就回不去以前了。

我心里其实挺希望一切能回到 2000 年代和 2010 年代那会儿的感觉，但是，唉，听天由命吧。我对这个社会和人类有点绝望了。我已经累了，看着事情变得越来越糟，大家整天想着攻击和分裂小众群体，把人逼到绝境。真的很讨厌现在的社会，大家都不懂得尊重，也不再团结了。
hypo_2:
作为怪人之一，我们经常在各个地方被针对。不管是在网上、线下，甚至是来自你最亲近的人。那些攻击通常源于恐同、恐跨，或者有时候纯粹就是看不惯我们有多怪、行为有多怪，尤其是那些玩得更深、比如搞角色扮演和兽祖认同的兽迷。

所以，我们中有些人选择隐藏身份和来历，以此来获得安全感。有些人则只向朋友或死党公开。露脸或露身材算是一种圈内文化了，大多数兽迷至少都在私密动态里发过一次，不管是那种“等下就删”的帖子还是发在限时动态里。

尽管如此，我们对线下的面基依然很积极。我们会搞兽聚——也就是兽迷之间的线下聚会，不管是俩人面基还是群聚，不管是在展会上还是平时出来面基——有时还会办兽展，比如 MWFF、IWAG、PAWAI、FURUM 等等。在线下和大家见面、结识彼此、见到真人真的很开心，毕竟我们大多数人以前都没见过对方长啥样。我们可以拍张照片自己留着，发到网上时打个码，一起哈哈大笑、聊聊共同的兴趣爱好。真的很开心、很有爱、很温暖。

不过，现在感觉变味了。随着人们开始试图扒掉别人的马甲、攻击并人肉兽迷、兽祖和 LGBTQIA 群体，再加上我们圈子内部也经常吃瓜撕逼、带节奏，事情变得有点越来越乱了，没那么温暖了，也越来越没有大家庭的感觉了。早就回不到从前了。

我心里其实挺希望一切能回到 2000 年代和 2010 年代那会儿的感觉，但是，唉，听天由命吧。我对这个社会和人类有点绝望了。我已经累了，看着事情变得越来越糟，大家整天想着攻击和分裂小众群体，把人逼到绝境。真的很讨厌现在的社会，大家都不懂得尊重，也不再团结了。
hypo_3:
作为怪人之一，我们经常在各个地方挨骂。不管是在网上、线下，甚至是从你最亲近的人那儿。那些攻击通常是因为恐同、恐跨，或者有时候纯粹就是看不惯我们有多怪、行为有多奇葩，尤其是那些玩得更深、比如搞语c（角色扮演）和兽祖认同（therianthropy）的兽迷。

所以，我们中有些人选择隐藏身份和来自哪里，以此来保护自己。有些人则只向朋友或闺蜜死党公开。露脸或者露身材算是一种圈内文化了，大多数兽迷至少都在私密动态里发过一次，不管是那种“秒删”贴还是发在限时动态里。

source_doc:
Aren't you going to say goodbye to me?
How did you know I was going?
I knew it this afternoon.
The way you faced up to him.
Well, I would have told him then.
Except for you.
I thought it would be best if I slipped out this way.
Are you sure you're doing the right thing?
There's nothing else I can do.
Will you.
Will you let me know where you are?
Paul?
As soon as I know myself.

source_doc:
@rechelon extremely unpopular is one way of putting it… i don’t live in berlin but i think people everywhere had roughly the same response, which is “fuck these assholes for doing something that leaves so many uninvolved people without electricity and treating it like necessary collateral damage”. I’ve seen lots of people speculate that it was a false flag to make the left look bad. Not that the cops care, they are probably giddy with excitement now (a gross thing to imagine) that they have a pretense to raid and criminalize the leftist scene.

@enby_of_the_apocalypse
Yeah, I mean it seems like there's still about half a dozen anticivs raised on meme accounts who are shocked the scene didn't stand with them, but are extremely shocked that old timer anticivs who felt disrespected by said crew and haven't backed them.

@enby_of_the_apocalypse
I do worry that we'll see a self-justification spiral where a handful of anticivs get so mad at the movement for not supporting their super based attack on the civilized that they end up in ITS level shit within a year or two of isolation and seething.

source_doc:
Outside of court a never ending stream of flying monkeys has doxxed, harassed and threatened me and anyone they believe have "helped" me in anyway shape or form.
One flying monkey is the tiktoker Areej "liberationluvr" Hakim who jumped on my ex's public posts, and knows my ex privately.
I'll re-post some of their videos about me with a CW.
But I want to make it clear how much these people wish to erase me and my few accomplishments.
Here's violent threats about a witness in my case.

This tiktoker has made it their PRIMARY content to attempt to dox me, my friends and specifically witnesses to my illegal eviction.
In the video they made about me they attempt to paint me as "not an activist", "not a hacker" and "just a grifter".
ALL because my ex decided that splitting bills while navigating a break constituted domestic violence.
They then call their constant online lynch mob chasing me around "activism" and fund raise off MY pain and court process.
#ParentingWhileBlack

Areej "solidarityluvr" is known locally for posting tiktoks of herself stalking + harassing multiple of her ex's all on her tiktok+IG.
Areej maced a trans librarian, Canyon, ON camera as she got off work likely bc Canyon had to enforce BASIC library rules.
Areej cyberbullied Canyon for months after.
Canyon soon thereafter died of a suspected intentional drug overdose.
Many in the community believe Areej's actions directly contributed to Canyon's death.
THESE are the "friends" my ex keeps.

Anywho... this type of leftist infighting, is the worst portlandia coded telenovela ever.
I've NEVER posted anything at all publicly about Areej till now.
Areej did contact me 2years ago with some infighting, which I immediately DECLINED to be involved with.
I had a few private & community conversations about the issues they raised to ensure a restorative justice process had or would occur.
One had occured and had plenty of support so I bowed out.
This had been the extent of our contact.

At the time I bowed out I warned the community against cyber bullying especially 3rd parties to the initial interpersonal conflict.
This warning was directed to Areej, I felt their cyber bullying ON top of the already existing decisions in their favor was in poor taste.
I especially felt Areej doxxing the restorative justice committee/mediators DURING the process was actively abusive.
I warned specifically about the likelihood of Areej's victims self harming being a real risk.

hypo_0:
在法庭之外，一波又一波的“飞猴”（帮凶）对我，以及任何他们认为以任何形式“帮助”过我的人，进行了人肉搜索、骚扰和威胁。
其中一个帮凶是抖音（TikTok）网红 Areej "liberationluvr" Hakim，她不仅跑去我前任的公开帖子下互动，私底下也认识我前任。
我会重新发布一些他们针对我的视频，并加上内容警告（CW）。
但我只想让大家看清楚，这些人有多想抹杀我和我那点微不足道的成就。
以下是针对我案子中一名证人的暴力威胁。

这个抖音网红把人肉我、我的朋友，尤其是指证我被非法驱逐的证人，当成了自己的“主营业务”。
在他们制作的关于我的视频里，他们试图把我抹黑成“不是活动家”、“不是黑客”，而“只是个骗子”。
而这一切，仅仅是因为我前任认为在分手过渡期分摊账单算作“家庭暴力”。
然后，他们把这群在网上对我穷追猛打的网络暴民称为“积极分子”，并利用我的痛苦和诉讼过程来筹款。
#黑人育儿

Areej "solidarityluvr" 在当地是出了名的，因为她经常在抖音和照片墙（IG）上发布自己跟踪和骚扰好几个前任的视频。
Areej 曾在镜头前，对刚下班的跨性别图书管理员 Canyon 喷防狼喷雾，很可能是因为 Canyon 必须执行图书馆的基本规定。
之后，Areej 对 Canyon 进行了长达数月的网络暴力。
不久后，Canyon 死于疑似蓄意药物过量。
社区里很多人认为，Areej 的所作所为直接导致了 Canyon 的死亡。
这就是我前任交的“好朋友”。

反正吧……这种左翼内斗，简直是史上最烂的、充满波特兰讽刺风格的狗血肥皂剧。
在这之前，我从未在公开场合发过任何关于 Areej 的内容。
两年前，Areej 确实因为一些内斗联系过我，我当即拒绝参与。
我就他们提出的问题进行过几次私下和社区内的讨论，以确保恢复性司法程序已经或将会进行。
既然程序已经启动且得到了很多支持，我就退出了。
这就是我们仅有的接触了。

在我退出的时候，我曾警告过社区，不要进行网络暴力，尤其是针对最初人际冲突之外的第三方。
这个警告是针对 Areej 的，我觉得在事情明明已经朝着有利于她的方向解决的情况下，她还要进行网暴，真的很下作。
我尤其觉得 Areej 在过程进行中人肉恢复性司法委员会/调解员的行为是赤裸裸的霸凌。
我当时还特意警告过，Areej 的受害者极有可能面临自残的真实风险。

这个 TikTok 网红把人肉我、我的朋友，尤其是指证我被非法驱逐的证人，当成了自己的“主营业务”。
在他们做的那期关于我的视频里，他们试图把我描绘成“不是活动家”、“不是黑客”，而“只是个骗子”。
而这一切，仅仅是因为我前任觉得在分手过渡期分摊账单算作“家庭暴力”。
然后，他们把这群在网上对我穷追猛打的网络暴民称为“积极分子”，并利用我的痛苦和诉讼过程来筹款。
#黑人育儿

Areej "solidarityluvr" 在当地是出了名的，因为她经常在 TikTok 和 IG 上发自己跟踪和骚扰好几个前任的视频。
Areej 曾在镜头前，对刚下班的跨性别图书管理员 Canyon 喷防狼喷雾，很可能是因为 Canyon 必须执行图书馆的基本规定。
之后，Areej 对 Canyon 进行了长达数月的网暴。
不久后，Canyon 死于疑似蓄意药物过量。
社区里很多人觉得，Areej 的所作所为直接导致了 Canyon 的死亡。
这就是我前任交的“好朋友”。

反正吧……这种左倾内斗，简直是史上最烂、充满波特兰讽刺风格的狗血肥皂剧。
在这之前，我从未在公开场合发过任何关于 Areej 的东西。
两年前，Areej 确实因为一些内斗联系过我，我当即拒绝参与。
我就他们提的问题进行过几次私下和社区内的讨论，以确保恢复性司法程序已经或将会进行。
既然程序已经启动且得到了很多支持，我就退出了。
这就是我们仅有的接触了。

在我退出的时候，我曾警告过社区，不要搞网暴，尤其是针对最初人际冲突之外的第三方。
这个警告是冲着 Areej 去的，我觉得在事情明明已经朝着有利于她的方向解决的情况下，她还要搞网暴，真的很下作。
我尤其觉得 Areej 在过程进行中人肉恢复性司法委员会/调解员的行为是赤裸裸的施暴。
我当时还特意警告过，Areej 的受害者极有可能面临自残的真实风险。

这个警告是冲着 Areej 去的，我觉得在事情明明已经朝着有利于她的方向解决的情况下，她还要搞网暴，真的很下作。
我尤其觉得 Areej 在程序进行期间人肉恢复性司法委员会/调解员的行为是赤裸裸的施暴。
我当时还特意警告过，Areej 的受害者极有可能面临自残的真实风险。
hypothesis:
法庭之外，一波又一波的“飞猴”（帮凶）没完没了地人肉、骚扰和威胁我，还有任何他们觉得以任何方式“帮”过我的人。
其中一个帮凶是 Tiktok 网红 Areej "liberationluvr" Hakim，她不仅跑去我前任的公开帖子下面胡搅蛮缠，私底下也认识我前任。
我会重新发一些他们针对我的视频，并加上内容警告（CW）。
但我只想让大家看清楚，这些人有多想抹杀我和我那点微不足道的成就。
以下是针对我案子里一名证人的暴力威胁。

这个 Tiktok 网红把人肉我、我的朋友，尤其是指证我被非法驱逐的证人，当成了自己的“主营业务”。
在他们做的那期关于我的视频里，他们试图把我抹黑成“不是活动家”、“不是黑客”，而“只是个骗子”。
而这一切，仅仅是因为我前任觉得在闹分手期间分摊账单算作“家庭暴力”。
然后，他们把这群在网上对我穷追猛打的网络暴民称为“积极行动”，并利用我的痛苦和诉讼过程来圈钱。
#黑人育儿

Areej "solidarityluvr" 在当地是出了名的，因为她经常在 Tiktok 和 IG 上发自己跟踪和骚扰好几个前任的视频。
Areej 曾在镜头前，对刚下班的跨性别图书管理员 Canyon 喷防狼喷雾，很可能是因为 Canyon 只是执行了图书馆的基本规定。
之后，Areej 对 Canyon 进行了长达数月的网暴。
不久后，Canyon 死于疑似蓄意药物过量。
社区里很多人觉得，Areej 的所作所为直接逼死了 Canyon。
这就是我前任交的“好朋友”。

反正吧……这种左翼内斗，简直是史上最烂、充满波特兰讽刺风格的狗血剧。
在这之前，我从未在公开场合发过任何关于 Areej 的东西。
两年前，Areej 确实因为一些内斗联系过我，我当即拒绝掺和。
我就他们提的问题进行过几次私下和社区内的讨论，以确保恢复性司法程序已经或将会进行。
既然程序已经启动且得到了很多支持，我就退出了。
这就是我们仅有的接触了。

在我退出的时候，我曾警告过社区，不要搞网暴，尤其是针对最初人际冲突之外的第三方。
这个警告是冲着 Areej 去的，我觉得在事情明明已经朝着有利于她的方向解决的情况下，她还要搞网暴，真的很下作。
我尤其觉得 Areej 在程序进行期间人肉恢复性司法委员会/调解员的行为是赤裸裸的施暴。
我当时还特意警告过，Areej 的受害者极有可能面临自残的真实风险。

source_doc:
Just so you know, Harriet and I didn't actually get back together.
What?
But I saw you kiss her.
Joan.
My acting like I liked you turned real.
And now I'm all confused because I got what I wanted.
But I don't think I want it anymore.
Like that time my parents got Fergie to perform at my ninth birthday and I was like, oh, this is sick.
Then she actually performed and I was like, oh, I forgot what Fergie sounds like.
Does that make sense?
It makes all the sense.

source_doc:
and it's not a bad film — it's a spectacular-looking one in spots — but it is also a film entirely made out of other, better and more thematically cohesive films. so it's 2001 and the three-body problem and arrival and wall-e a little bit, but it's also Quips Sexyman Saves The World Part XVII and ultimately just not that lot

while watching i wondered why the earth needed to be in peril, and if the other two members of the multicultural crew dying to leave the White Man in charge was some kind of an anti-woke statement; but in light of some of the book author andy weir's 'most media literate libertarian' comments about how star trek should be just about spaceships going pew-pew, at least to him the answer is yes to the latter and 'fascism' to the former

@esvrld I read the book a little while back and I may have given him too much credit, especially given his recent decision to open his mouth, but I took the death of the international crew to strand the white boy as an understanding that his second book failed because he is not any good at writing people interacting with each other and his only skill is creating clever little puzzles for his self-insert to solve in complete isolation. Giving him an alien buddy was a good move because it opens the possibility of character interaction without requiring it to resemble the way humans relate to one another

hypo_0:
而且这片子其实不烂——部分画面看起来还挺壮观的——但它完全是用其他更好、主题更连贯的电影拼凑出来的。所以它有点像《2001太空漫游》、《三体》、《降临》，还有点《机器人总动员》的影子，但它本质上还是《俏皮帅哥拯救世界第17部》那一套，最后感觉也就那样吧

看的时候我就在想，为什么地球非得面临危机？还有，那两个多元文化背景的船员死掉、最后只剩白人男性掌权，这算不算某种“反觉醒”宣言？不过结合原著作者安迪·威尔作为“最懂媒体的自由意志主义者”发表的那些言论（比如觉得《星际迷航》就该只是飞船突突突），至少对他来说，后者的答案是肯定的，而前者的答案则是“法西斯主义”

@esvrld 我不久前读了原著，可能之前高估他了，特别是考虑到他最近管不住自己的嘴发表的那些言论。不过我把国际船员的牺牲、最后只留下白人小哥的设定，理解为他意识到自己的第二本书之所以失败，是因为他根本不擅长写人际交往。他唯一的本事就是设计一些聪明的小谜题，让他的自我投射角色在完全孤立的环境下去解决。给他安排一个外星人盟友倒是个聪明的举动，因为这既创造了角色互动的可能，又不需要这种互动看起来像人类之间的相处方式
